note: Deep NN-fleet audit (73-agent workflow). KEY FIELD: wiring_confirmed — the recurring pathology is 'feed wired, inference orphaned'. NOT auto-generated yet; see tracking rec.

records.name: positive_memory
records.purpose: Produce a real-time [0,1] "positive-memory regime" signal (the first Tier-2 Matrix Protocol specialist, P3.6) so JARVIS can broadcast how positive her current memory/mood state is into the global-broadcast / policy state vector.
records.teacher_source: Circular self-supervision: the NN is trained to predict the encoder's OWN regime label (Y = _matrix_label(encoder.compute_signal_value(ctx)), one-hot) from the encoder's OWN 16-dim features (X = encoder.encode(ctx)) — orchestrator.py:905-924 (_observe_matrix_signals), 962-980 (_matrix_training_set), 1057-1059 (train_distillation, mse). The teacher IS the heuristic encoder. There is NO external teacher model, NO lived-outcome reward, NO bigger-model distillation. "Accuracy" therefore means only "the NN learned to mimic its own encoder" (orchestrator.py:98 comment confirms this).
records.consumed_by: The HEURISTIC encoder's scalar is consumed (conditionally): orchestrator._matrix_focus_signal/_compute_signal_value -> PositiveMemoryEncoder.compute_signal_value (orchestrator.py:1929-1935) -> get_hemisphere_signals broadcast-slot competition (orchestrator.py:1853-1890) -> consciousness/engine.py:821-823 set_hemisphere_signals -> policy/state_encoder.py:165-170 dims 16-19 of the live policy state vector. BUT consumption is GATED on positive_memory winning a top-N broadcast slot vs Tier-1 distilled specialists (which carry a +0.05 tier_bonus and higher accuracy, orchestrator.py:2516-2518). The trained NN's RAW OUTPUT has NO consumer: architect.py:226-231 explicitly states "The orchestrator does not consume the raw output for the broadcast slot — it uses PositiveMemoryEncoder.compute_signal_value." So the learned network is effectively ORPHANED; only the heuristic feeds behavior.
records.maturity_state: shadow / earning (CANDIDATE_BIRTH -> PROBATIONARY -> VERIFIED -> BROADCAST_ELIGIBLE -> PROMOTED Matrix lifecycle, gated in _check_specialist_promotions). This repo is a non-running snapshot (no ~/.jarvis/hemispheres/positive_memory weights present), so live stage is indeterminate from code; by design it births only when its signal buffer shows >=2 regimes over 30 samples (orchestrator.py:944-952) and earns broadcast influence via the impact formula (orchestrator.py:2528-2564).
records.end_state: A promoted Tier-2 sub-conscious specialist permanently holding a global-broadcast slot, contributing a learned positive-memory valence signal to the policy/cognition state vector — and the working TEMPLATE for the rest of the Tier-2 ladder (P3.7-P3.10). The intended end state is that the trained NN replaces the heuristic encoder as the broadcast source once it earns it; today the heuristic is permanent because nothing reads the NN's output.
records.duplicates: Heavy family redundancy: negative_memory_encoder.py, speaker_profile_encoder.py, temporal_pattern_encoder.py, skill_transfer_encoder.py are structurally near-identical mirrors (same FEATURE_DIM=16, same _clamp/_safe_attr/_mean helpers, same 3-block 0.50/0.30/0.20 compose, each docstring/builder literally labeled "Mirror of _build_positive_memory_context"). reasoning_encoder.py is a 6th sibling. positive_memory and negative_memory overlap most directly (positive vs negative valence over the SAME recent-memory/episode source). Redundancy is intentional-by-template, not accidental.
records.concerns: 1) THE LEARNED NN IS ORPHANED: its raw output is never consumed (architect.py:226-231); only the heuristic scalar feeds the broadcast. The NN exists solely to "reserve a lifecycle seat" and earn promotion, but promotion changes nothing about what signal is broadcast — the heuristic remains the source either way. This is a distillation-to-nowhere. 2) CIRCULAR TEACHER: training is self-supervised on the encoder's own label, so accuracy measures self-mimicry, not predictive validity against any ground truth — a near-deterministic 16d->label map is trivially learnable, inflating the impact/verification score (downstream_reward = accuracy*1.5, orchestrator.py:2546) without real-world signal. 3) Block B (episodic) is DEAD in production: _build_positive_memory_context never populates recent_episodes (orchestrator.py:2025-2031 note: EpisodicMemory handle not available), so 30% of the signal weight collapses to ~episode_volume=0; emotion_positive_bias is also hardwired 0.0 (orchestrator.py:2033-2042). The live signal is effectively memory-valence (tags+weights) + traits + mood_positivity only. 4) Consumption is gated on out-competing Tier-1 distilled specialists that get a structural +0.05 bonus and real accuracy — positive_memory may rarely or never actually reach the live policy slots even when promoted, making it shadow-in-practice. 5) Tag-substring valence is brittle (e.g. "win"/"won" substrings, "love" matches "glove"/"clove") though the author hand-curated the set defensively.
records.fix_needed: To un-orphan the trained NN, make _compute_signal_value (or _matrix_focus_signal) consume the network's forward-pass output for POSITIVE_MEMORY once the specialist is mature (e.g. VERIFIED_PROBATIONARY+): run _engine.infer(network.id, encoder.encode(ctx)), map the 4-class softmax to a scalar (e.g. expected-regime value), and return that instead of the heuristic compute_signal_value, while keeping the heuristic as the CANDIDATE_BIRTH/untrained fallback. Separately, to make 'accuracy' mean something beyond self-mimicry, the distillation target should incorporate a real external/lived signal (e.g. actual positive-affect outcomes from record_outcome) rather than the encoder's own regime label; until then, keep authority firewalled and do not treat the accuracy as a grounded competence metric.
records.verdict: The claim is accurate. The trained NN's raw output is genuinely orphaned: the only NN-inference call site in the hemisphere stack (orchestrator.py:1908) is short-circuited for POSITIVE_MEMORY by _matrix_focus_signal returning the HEURISTIC encoder's compute_signal_value first (orchestrator.py:1903-1905, 1929-1935), exactly as architect.py:226-231 documents verbatim. The heuristic scalar (not the NN) is what conditionally reaches the live policy state vector dims 16-19 — gated on winning a main broadcast slot vs Tier-1 specialists carrying a +0.05 tier_bonus (orchestrator.py:1841-1890, 2516-2518; engine.py:821-823; state_encoder.py:164-170). Training is real and connected (Adam/backprop in engine.py:448-509) but circular self-supervision: X=encoder.encode(ctx), Y=onehot of encoder.compute_signal_value(ctx), teacher IS the encoder (orchestrator.py:905-924, 962-980, 1057-1059) — so 'accuracy' only means the NN mimics its own encoder. Note: there is also a separate M3 matrix-vs-matrix lane (_update_matrix_broadcast_slots, MATRIX_BROADCAST_SLOTS=2) but it is only the PROMOTED-dwell gate and does NOT feed the policy vector; it doesn't change the orphaned-NN conclusion.

records.name: negative_memory
records.purpose: A negative-valence + epistemic-friction sensor for the Tier-2 Matrix Protocol: surface "how much negative memory / system distress is present right now" as a scalar that competes for a sub-conscious broadcast slot.
records.teacher_source: Self-supervised / circular: the teacher is the encoder's OWN compute_signal_value bucketed into a 4-class regime label via _matrix_label (orchestrator.py:900-903, 919). No external model, no lived outcome, no human label. Effectively the NN is taught to reproduce its own analytic heuristic over the encoder's own features.
records.consumed_by: Trained NN output: NONE FOUND (architect.py:236-237 states the orchestrator does not consume it). Encoder heuristic scalar: orchestrator.py:1947 -> get_hemisphere_signals (1830) -> consciousness/engine.py:821 -> policy/state_encoder.py:166 slot read (a known policy dead-end).
records.maturity_state: Shadow / CANDIDATE_BIRTH-only by design; not born in this snapshot (no on-disk hemisphere). Encoder is heuristic-untrained-by-design and never earns.
records.end_state: A PROMOTED sub-conscious negative-valence/epistemic-distress signal feeding JARVIS's policy/affect inner read — but its trained NN output stays unconsumed, so genuine maturation needs the output (or a calibrated valence head) wired into the live signal AND a policy that actually uses the slot.
records.duplicates: positive_memory_encoder (direct valence-mirror, same template); speaker_profile_encoder, temporal_pattern_encoder, skill_transfer_encoder (same Matrix Tier-2 scaffold). Five copies of one pattern.
records.concerns: Circular self-distillation (NN target = own heuristic), orphaned trained output, impact gate decoupled from real downstream effect, terminal consumer is the proven dead-end policy StateEncoder, and several friction inputs are zero stubs so the live signal rides on ~3 features. Honestly documented but functionally a shadow specialist that trains to mimic itself.
records.fix_needed: Two independent fixes needed for genuine maturation. (a) Output consumption: either wire a calibrated negative-valence head's NN output into the live signal (replacing the heuristic short-circuit in _matrix_focus_signal), OR explicitly read the _matrix_broadcast lane into the LIVE StateEncoder (today only ShadowStateEncoder/slot_4-5 sees it) AND get the policy NN to actually use the slot to alter an action (the policy slot is currently an empirically dead input, Spearman ~0.06). (b) Teacher de-circularization: replace the self-label (_matrix_label of the encoder's own compute_signal_value) with an external teacher signal — e.g. lived user-correction/quarantine/regression OUTCOMES already collected in record_outcome buffers — so the distillation learns something the heuristic doesn't already encode. Until both land, treat negative_memory as honest shadow substrate, not a live affect/policy input.
records.verdict: Claim survives adversarial refutation on all three axes. (1) The trained NN's raw 4-class output is genuinely UNCONSUMED — architect.py:236-237 and orchestrator.py:1903-1947 short-circuit to NegativeMemoryEncoder.compute_signal_value (the analytic heuristic) and never read the network forward() output; the net exists only to clear Matrix lifecycle gates. (2) The encoder heuristic scalar's path (orchestrator.py:1947 -> get_hemisphere_signals:1830 -> engine.py:821 -> state_encoder.py:166 slot read) is real but a confirmed dead-end: by M3 design (orchestrator.py:111-117) Tier-2 specialists have their score halved (line 2523) and cannot beat ~1.0-acc Tier-1 incumbents at SLOT_SWAP_THRESHOLD=1.15, so they never occupy slot_0..slot_3; their only live home is the separate _matrix_broadcast lane (line 229) that the live StateEncoder does NOT read (only the M6 ShadowStateEncoder reads slot_4/5), and the policy NN reading those slots is itself an empirically-dead signal. (3) Training is real and wired (orchestrator.py:998-1059: build 4-class model, train_distillation MSE, persist) but the teacher is circular/self-supervised — label = _matrix_label(compute_signal_value) over the encoder's own features (orchestrator.py:919, 900-903), no external/lived/human signal. So it is a PROMOTED-but-unconsumed sub-conscious heuristic, not a live behavioral signal.

records.name: reasoning_encoder

records.consumed_by: All consumers are shadow/observability — NO live behavior consumes the output. (1) consciousness/consciousness_system.py:836-837 calls maybe_observe_grounded_stance() on the belief-graph tick: logs + increments _grounded_stances_shadowed, no thought/episode/write. (2) consciousness/consciousness_system.py:2090-2095 calls propose_grounded_thought_focus + note_thought_focus_proposal on the existential cycle: logged/counted + appended to ~/.jarvis/thought_focus_shadow.jsonl, but the live existential category stays RANDOM (conduct_inquiry at line 2077 unchanged; get_status note at lines 626-627 confirms "not consumed by context.py"). (3) autonomy/research_intent.py:215-216 (called via autonomy/event_bridge.py:234) snapshots compute_live_signal() into the 'reasoning_validation' distillation stream as a feature. (4) dashboard/snapshot.py:1644-1645 surfaces get_status() under grounding.native_reasoning for dashboard/static/v2/grounding.html. The reasoning_validation stream is READ ONLY by reasoning_stream_status() + the dashboard + tests — NO trainer/specialist distills from it.
records.maturity_state: shadow / P0 — every status payload self-labels phase="P0_shadow", authority="shadow_observe_only". The distillation stream it seeds is documented ~0 reps; REASONING_STREAM_PHASE1_THRESHOLD=30 is an informational target that flips no authority. No NN exists yet to be "earning"; it is collecting reps (jump-before-you-dunk).
records.end_state: The witness/seed-collector for a future native_reasoning specialist NN: once enough reasoning-STATE->outcome reps accrue (Phase 1+, maturity-gated, external-only teacher), a distilled native reasoner trains on the reasoning_validation stream and EARNS its way to replacing qwen's existential/meta enrichment — JARVIS reasoning FROM her own held beliefs with confidence gated on grounding-coherence (confident when grounded, tentative when not), and belief-derived (not random) existential thought-focus going live.

Native Cognition #3 sibling: consciousness/meta_cognitive_thoughts.py TensionThoughtPromotion / the THOUGHT_TRIGGER_SELECTOR focus (hemisphere/thought_trigger_encoder.py) both read THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME — and this encoder's Block B literally READS TensionThoughtPromotion's status, so they are layered, not duplicated. epistemic/provenance_scorer.py is the upstream grounding report this consumes (one canonical source). records.concerns: (1) MISLABELED AS AN NN: no neural network here — no weights, no nn.Module, no training step. Hand-designed deterministic encoder + fixed-weight scalar (0.50/0.30/0.20). FOCUS_NAME="native_reasoning" is NOT a HemisphereFocus enum member (types.py:20-63), NOT in data_feed.py focus dispatch, and no architect/engine/registry instantiates a model for it. The "writer-literal scan" comment (lines 56-58) makes the schema audit treat it as the live writer for a focus that has no model. (4) Otherwise clean: strictly view-only, default-safe, never writes beliefs/memory/thoughts, honest zero-on-empty, no live lever — exactly as a P0 shadow should be. records.fix_needed: none

All four consumers verified as shadow/observability-only: site 1 (consciousness_system.py:836-837) ignores the returned stance and the module emits no events/beliefs/thoughts; site 2 (2090-2095) logs the thought-focus proposal to ~/.jarvis/thought_focus_shadow.jsonl while conduct_inquiry at 2077 is called WITHOUT a category arg so the live existential focus stays random; site 3 (research_intent.py:215-216) snapshots compute_live_signal() as a feature in the reasoning_validation distillation record; site 4 (snapshot.py:1644-1645) surfaces get_status() on the dashboard. records.name: skill_transfer
records.purpose: Advisory "is the skill ecosystem rich/diverse enough for cross-skill transfer to be meaningful?" signal — the 5th and final Tier-2 Matrix Protocol specialist, under a hard "similarity-is-NOT-capability" truth boundary.
records.teacher_source: Synthetic / tautological: the teacher is the module's OWN heuristic — labels = _matrix_label(SkillTransferEncoder.compute_signal_value(ctx)) bucketed into 4 regimes, features = SkillTransferEncoder.encode(ctx) over the same live registry snapshot (orchestrator.py:905-924). No external teacher model, no lived transfer outcomes, no human label. The encoder heuristic itself is hand-tuned (weights 0.50/0.30/0.20, conservative caps), never trained.
records.consumed_by: Heuristic encoder scalar: orchestrator._matrix_focus_signal -> _compute_signal_value (orchestrator.py:1977-1988, 1903-1905); becomes the candidate "value" in get_hemisphere_signals (orchestrator.py:1853). HOWEVER it is gated out of live behavior two ways: (a) by M3 design Tier-2 specialists do NOT win the main 4 broadcast slots that feed the policy StateEncoder dims 16-19 (orchestrator.py:111-117; state_encoder.py:164-170) — they only compete in the matrix-vs-matrix "sub-conscious" lane (_update_matrix_broadcast_slots, :1108-1137); and (b) that lane ranks purely by specialist_impact_score (verification/accuracy/recency — _compute_specialist_impact :2527-2564), which NEVER reads the encoder's signal value. The TRAINED NN's output is ORPHANED entirely: _matrix_focus_signal short-circuits to the heuristic scalar before any network inference, so engine.infer on this net is never consumed in the live path. Net live cognitive consumer of either the scalar or the NN: NONE FOUND. Lane output is only dwell->PROMOTED self-progression + matrix_report observability (dashboard/app.py:1110).
records.maturity_state: Shadow / autonomous-birth-gated. It is MATRIX_ELIGIBLE (types.py:67-73) and removed from the future-only whitelist (writer literal live, schema_emission_audit.py:117), so it can be born once its signal buffer accumulates MATRIX_BIRTH_MIN_SAMPLES with >=2 distinct regimes (birth-variation honesty gate, orchestrator.py:946-952). No evidence in code of a persisted/promoted instance; lifecycle starts at CANDIDATE_BIRTH. Even if promoted, promotion only earns it a sub-conscious-lane slot, not live influence. Effectively shadow/level-0 substrate.
records.end_state: Per its swim-lane design, it is SUPPOSED to mature through the Matrix ladder (candidate_birth -> probationary -> verified -> broadcast_eligible -> promoted) and become a sub-conscious advisor that flags "this new skill resembles prior verified skill families / this transfer path is promising" — an intuition that targets/biases self-improvement and capability acquisition WITHOUT ever asserting capability is proven (the capability_gate stays sole authority). For that role to become real, two wires must be built that do not exist yet: a consumer that actually reads the matrix lane (currently dead-ends at dwell/promotion) and replacement of the tautological teacher with a real transfer-outcome signal.
records.duplicates: High structural redundancy by template: it is one of FIVE near-identical Tier-2 encoders (positive_memory P3.6, negative_memory P3.7, speaker_profile P3.8, temporal_pattern P3.9, skill_transfer P3.10) — same 16-dim/3-block layout, same compute_signal_value contract, same orchestrator dispatch, all sharing the single matrix swim-lane (orchestrator.py:887-891). Not a purpose-duplicate (each reads a different live domain), but the wiring/maturity story is identical across all five: all five trained NNs are orphaned by the same short-circuit, and all five compete only among themselves.
records.concerns: (1) TAUTOLOGICAL TRAINING: the trained NN is distilled to predict _matrix_label(encoder.compute_signal_value) from encoder.encode (orchestrator.py:905-924, 998-1059) — student and teacher are the SAME weightless heuristic, so "accuracy" measures self-consistency, not any external truth about skill transfer. No lived-outcome teacher, no transfer-success signal. (2) ORPHANED NN OUTPUT: _matrix_focus_signal returns the heuristic scalar before any network inference, so the trained net's forward pass is never consumed in the live signal path; the NN exists only to satisfy the accuracy>0.5 gate and accrue dwell. (3) SCALAR IS ALSO LARGELY DEAD: by M3 design Tier-2 never wins a main broadcast slot (the only path into the policy StateEncoder), and the matrix lane ranks by impact_score which ignores the signal value — so neither the heuristic scalar nor the NN output reaches any live cognitive/conversational behavior. It is honest shadow substrate, but calling it a "specialist" overstates current consumption. (4) compute_signal_value is the EXPLICIT replacement for the accuracy-as-proxy fallback (docstring), which is a genuine honesty improvement, but it means the lane's whole point (the trained NN) is decorative until a real downstream reader is built. The truth-boundary (no capability/verify/promote leakage) is well-enforced and not a concern.
records.fix_needed: Two wires must be built for the lane to matter, both correctly identified by the claim: (1) a real live consumer that reads the matrix sub-conscious lane (matrix_broadcast_slots / promoted specialists) into an actual cognitive path — self-improvement/capability-acquisition targeting — instead of dead-ending at dwell/promotion + dashboard observability; and (2) replace the tautological self-supervised teacher with a real transfer-outcome signal (e.g. labels derived from observed cross-skill transfer success vs failure from the learning-job/capability-gate history) so the NN learns something the heuristic does not already encode. Until both exist, this remains an honest shadow specialist whose NN output is orphaned; the firewall keeping it out of capability promotion is correct and should be preserved (capability_gate stays sole authority).
records.verdict: Claim verified. The TRAINED NN's output is orphaned: _compute_signal_value (orchestrator.py:1903-1905) short-circuits to the heuristic scalar via _matrix_focus_signal (1977-1988) BEFORE engine.infer is ever reached for SKILL_TRANSFER, so the network's inference is never consumed. The heuristic scalar reaches all_candidates as a "value" (1853) and could in principle win a main slot (the (a) gate is a SOFT score gate, not a hard exclusion — minor imprecision in the claim's "gated out two ways" wording), but by M3 design it cannot beat ~1.0-accuracy Tier-1 incumbents at the 1.15x SLOT_SWAP_THRESHOLD; the real lane (_update_matrix_broadcast_slots, 1108-1137) ranks by specialist_impact_score, which (_compute_specialist_impact, 2527-2564) never reads the encoder value. No live cognitive consumer found — lane output dead-ends at dwell->PROMOTED self-progression and matrix_report observability (dashboard app.py:1110). The distillation is real and runs (engine.train_distillation:448-509 = real Adam/backprop/grad-clip/accuracy update) but the teacher is tautological/synthetic exactly as claimed: label = _matrix_label(encoder.compute_signal_value(ctx)) over features = encoder.encode(ctx) (orchestrator.py:918-919) — the NN distills the module's own hand-tuned heuristic (0.50/0.30/0.20 weights), no external teacher, no lived transfer outcomes.

records.name: temporal_pattern
records.purpose: Produce a privacy-bounded [0,1] "is the current temporal/interaction rhythm familiar/stable?" signal from cadence/recency/mode-stability stats, as the 4th Tier-2 Matrix Protocol specialist — never claiming user-schedule facts.
records.consumed_by: TWO distinct things consume the ENCODER HEURISTIC (compute_signal_value), but NOTHING consumes the trained NN's output. (1) orchestrator._observe_matrix_signals (orchestrator.py:918-919) calls encode()+compute_signal_value() every evolution cycle to fill the self-supervised training buffer (always live). (2) compute_signal_value reaches the GLOBAL broadcast via _matrix_focus_signal (orchestrator.py:1965-1971) -> _compute_signal_value (1903-1905) -> get_hemisphere_signals slot competition (1841-1888) -> engine.on_tick set_hemisphere_signals (engine.py:821-823) -> policy/state_encoder.py:166-170 dims 16-19 -> policy network. BUT path (2) only fires once a TEMPORAL_PATTERN network exists at status READY/ACTIVE (_get_networks_for_focus, orchestrator.py:2935-2940), which requires autonomous birth (>=30 samples, >=2 regimes) + training. The trained 4-class NN inference output is NEVER read — engine.infer (orchestrator.py:1908) is the generic fallback that matrix focuses short-circuit past at 1903-1905 (confirmed by architect.py:256-258 "the orchestrator does not consume the raw output for the broadcast slot").
records.maturity_state: shadow / CANDIDATE_BIRTH-or-not-yet-born. Live deployment is remote (this repo is a non-running snapshot per memory); no ~/.jarvis/hemispheres/temporal_pattern artifact exists locally. subsystem_registry.json:877 declares expected state "not_born, signal buffers filling toward 30" post-reset. The signal buffer accrual (path 1) runs; promotion is gated by the 4-gate Matrix ladder (epoch>0 -> acc>0.5 -> impact>0.3 -> lane-dwell>=10).
records.end_state: Once it earns the Matrix ladder it becomes a PROMOTED Tier-2 sub-conscious specialist whose rhythm-familiarity scalar wins a Global Broadcast slot and thereby nudges the policy network's timing/behavior (dims 16-19) — giving JARVIS a grounded sense of "this interaction cadence is familiar/irregular" without ever storing a schedule fact. Per registry:878 even PROMOTED grants only a broadcast slot, never spoken/skill authority.
records.duplicates: No purpose-overlap, but it is one of 5 structurally near-identical Tier-2 encoders from the same template: positive_memory (P3.6), negative_memory (P3.7), speaker_profile (P3.8), temporal_pattern (P3.9), skill_transfer (P3.10). All are 16-dim block encoders with a compute_signal_value weighted-mean, dispatched identically in _matrix_focus_signal and _build_*_context. They differ only in input domain (temporal_pattern = cadence/rhythm), so there is heavy CODE-PATTERN redundancy but not signal redundancy.
records.concerns: 1) Trained-NN output is ORPHANED: the 4-class regime NN is birthed, trained (self-supervised on its own encoder's labels), persisted, and walks promotion gates, yet its inference is never consumed — the consumed signal is always the deterministic ENCODER HEURISTIC (compute_signal_value), not the network. The NN exists only to satisfy the lifecycle machinery; the "specialist" that earns a slot contributes a hand-weighted block-mean, not a learned function. 2) Self-supervised circularity: train_distillation teaches the NN to predict the SAME encoder's label from the SAME encoder's features (orchestrator.py:998-1059) — accuracy here measures the NN imitating a deterministic formula, not any lived/external truth, so the >0.5-accuracy gate is near-trivially clearable and the resulting "verification" is self-referential. 3) Real consumption depends on winning the Global Broadcast slot competition against Tier-1 distilled signals; if it never wins a slot, even a PROMOTED specialist's value never enters the policy vector (slot-gated, not just lifecycle-gated). 4) rhythm_familiarity (dim 15 of Block C) is permanently 0.0 — a declared-but-unbuilt feature dimension, by privacy-contract caution. None of these are bugs vs. design — the privacy/no-schedule-claim contract is solidly enforced (static-scan test + builder emits only counts/deltas) and the "earned-not-declared" gating is intact; but the headline is that the consumed signal is heuristic, the NN is decorative/lifecycle-only.

records.name: intention_delivery
records.purpose: Defines the frozen 24-dim feature vector + 4-class label encoding for a FUTURE "intention_delivery" hemisphere distillation specialist that would learn whether/when to proactively deliver a resolved intention (follow-up) to the user.
records.teacher_source: Designed teacher (not yet wired): the heuristic IntentionResolver's logged verdicts (teacher="intention_resolver_verdict", types.py:539/553) written to ~/.jarvis/intention_resolver_verdicts.jsonl (intention_resolver.py:31, _log_verdict 381-394), plus retroactive correctness via record_shadow_outcome (intention_resolver.py:211-216) — i.e. distillation-of-a-heuristic seeded by lived resolver decisions. Currently NO teacher signal is consumed because no specialist is registered. (Stage-0 ground-truth utterances exist in synthetic/commitment_exercise.py but feed the CapabilityGate, not this encoder.)
records.consumed_by: NONE FOUND in production. The encoder is imported ONLY by tests/test_intention_resolver.py:31-34 (and exercised at lines 263-325). The live intention path — consciousness/consciousness_system.py:2287-2300 building a ResolverSignal and calling IntentionResolver.evaluate() (heuristic, cognition/intention_resolver.py:254-366), surfaced by personality/proactive.py:245-266 and reasoning/bounded_response.py:449 — never imports hemisphere.intention_delivery_encoder, never calls encode()/encode_label(), and never constructs IntentionDeliveryFeatures (verified: cognition/intention_resolver.py has no "encode"/"hemisphere" reference, only docstring mentions at lines 11/136). A prior audit already recorded this exact correction in subsystem_registry.json:2460 ("imported ONLY by tests... NOT consumed by the live resolver... resolved to unwired/test-only").
records.maturity_state: Pre-build / inert reserved slot. The specialist this encoder is FOR does not exist: the DistillationConfig is commented out in hemisphere/types.py:552-561, there is no INTENTION_DELIVERY member in HemisphereFocus (only a TODO comment at types.py:547), no feature_source "intention_resolver_features" or teacher "intention_resolver_verdict" is registered anywhere live (only inside the commented block, types.py:539-540/553-559), and no model/weights artifact exists (find returned only the .py + its .pyc). The live Stage-1 layer is the heuristic IntentionResolver in shadow_only stage (cognition/intention_resolver.py:141, can_deliver() False until advisory_canary+, lines 186-188).
records.end_state: A Tier-1 permanent SHADOW-ONLY distillation specialist (input_dim 24, output_dim 4, kl_div, min_samples 15, is_permanent, shadow_only=True per types.py:533-544) that distills the heuristic IntentionResolver's verdicts: it would learn from logged resolver verdicts (~/.jarvis/intention_resolver_verdicts.jsonl) + retroactive outcomes whether a proactive intention delivery would be accepted/right, and once it beats the deterministic baseline on the standard promotion gate, replace the hand-written relevance heuristic (intention_resolver.py:135-136 "A future Stage 2 replaces these with a trained NN") to govern when JARVIS proactively volunteers follow-up results. It is explicitly designed to NEVER gate delivery directly (advisory only).
records.duplicates: No functional duplicate — it is the only encoder for proactive-intention-delivery relevance. It is one of a FAMILY of structurally-parallel single-purpose hemisphere encoders (diagnostic_encoder, dream_artifact_encoder, thought_trigger_encoder, claim_encoder, skill_acquisition_encoder), each a 24-dim encode + encode_label feeding a different distillation specialist; intention_delivery shares the SHAPE/contract but not the purpose. It also overlaps conceptually with the live heuristic IntentionResolver._compute_relevance_score (intention_resolver.py:345-366) — by design, since the eventual NN is meant to subsume that heuristic, not run alongside it.
records.concerns: (1) Misleading docstring: intention_delivery_encoder.py:3-7 claims it is "Used by: IntentionResolver (Stage 1): heuristic scoring enrichment" — this is FALSE; the resolver does not import or call it. Only the Stage-2 (inert) consumer is real-as-future. The label is "test-fixture / spec-frozen", not "live feature input." (2) Dead label semantics: encode_label only ever distinguishes deliver/suppress; "defer" yields a uniform no-signal label (lines 120-121), and the two "_was_wrong" classes (deliver_rejected idx1, suppressed_was_wrong idx3) are never emitted by the Stage-1 approximation — so any specialist trained today would see a degenerate 2-of-4-class target until real retroactive outcomes (record_shadow_outcome, intention_resolver.py:211-216) are wired into label generation, which they currently are NOT. (3) Genuinely orphaned today: the encoder computes nothing for live behavior; it is spec-frozen scaffolding awaiting Stage-2 build. This is honest by-design dormancy (matches the substrate-experience-wiring "shadow-first/never declare-before-earned" pattern), NOT a bug — but it must be cited as test-only/unwired, not as a working NN.
records.fix_needed: None required for honesty — the registry already correctly labels it orphaned/test-only and the claim matches reality. To actually ship it (Stage 2, per types.py:546-550), one would: (1) add INTENTION_DELIVERY to the HemisphereFocus enum, (2) uncomment/register the DistillationConfig at types.py:552-561, (3) add a trainer that reads ~/.jarvis/intention_resolver_verdicts.jsonl + record_shadow_outcome correctness as the teacher and runs the kl_div update over the 24-dim encode() features, keeping shadow_only=True (advisory, never gating delivery) until it beats the deterministic baseline on the promotion gate.
records.verdict: The audit claim is accurate and verified by direct grep: the 24-dim encoder is imported ONLY by tests/test_intention_resolver.py — no production importer. The live intention path (consciousness_system.py:2287-2300 builds a ResolverSignal, calls heuristic resolver.evaluate(), surfaced by proactive.py:245-266) never touches the encoder; the type="intention_delivery" string at proactive.py:262 is a ProactiveSuggestion label, not the NN. HemisphereFocus lacks INTENTION_DELIVERY (comment only, types.py:547) and the DistillationConfig is commented out (types.py:552-561), so no specialist is registered, no teacher signal is consumed, and there is no update/training step — it is a frozen, designed-but-inert Stage-2 reserved slot. The verdict JSONL teacher (intention_resolver_verdicts.jsonl, written by _log_verdict 381-394) is produced but read by nothing; subsystem_registry.json:2460 already records this exact unwired/test-only correction.

records.name: thought_trigger
records.raw_name: thought_trigger (hemisphere/thought_trigger_encoder.py — encoder for the thought_trigger_selector Tier-1 distillation specialist)
records.purpose: Feature/label codec for a planned shadow specialist meant to learn which meta-cognitive thought trigger (self_observation, existential_wonder, etc.) yields useful downstream outcomes given current system state.
records.teacher_source: Intended: external-only THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME on tension-seeded ResearchIntent completion (consciousness/events.py:457; emitted at autonomy/research_intent.py:188). BUT that signal is NOT routed to this NN's collector — it feeds the separate TensionThoughtPromotion gate (consciousness/meta_cognitive_thoughts.py:116 record_validation_outcome). The encoder's own OUTCOME_CLASSES and the config's teacher name "thought_trigger_resolver" have no producer. In practice: no teacher signal reaches this specialist.
records.consumed_by: NONE FOUND. The module thought_trigger_encoder.py is imported by ZERO files (grep -rn "thought_trigger_encoder" across the repo returns only the file itself). encode()/encode_label()/build_metadata() are never called. The downstream specialist config (hemisphere/types.py:513 thought_trigger_selector) references feature_source="thought_trigger_features" and teacher="thought_trigger_resolver", but NO emitter anywhere produces those signal names (grep for both returns only types.py itself), so the DistillationCollector never receives a thought_trigger feature/label pair and no student is ever trained. Contrast live feeds (claim_features, dream_features, skill_acquisition_features) which ARE fed via collector.record(...) at data_feed.py:761/818/925 and skills/capability_gate.py:1105.
records.maturity_state: Shadow / level-0 / BLOCKED_BY_DESIGN and input-starved. hemisphere/weight_room_gate.py:69-71 hardcodes any thought_trigger* teacher to MODE_BLOCKED_BY_DESIGN: "no live signal until THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME traffic flows (wired, input-starved)". scripts/schema_emission_audit.py:134 calls it a "Tier-1 shadow-only stub, no teacher signal wired yet (Phase 2 thought maturity roadmap)". subsystem_registry.json:2425 documents it as "wired-but-input-starved, latent until traffic flows". It has never trained, never been promoted, has no live influence.
records.end_state: A promoted distillation specialist that shadows (then beats) the deterministic meta-cognitive trigger resolver (consciousness/meta_cognitive_thoughts.TRIGGERS) — learning which thought trigger to fire from system state so JARVIS's autonomous inner-monologue/curiosity selection becomes a learned, outcome-grounded policy rather than hand-coded heuristics (SPARK_DESIGN §3 component 2 / §8 P3, types.py:505-512). Same promotion gate as other distillation specialists: stays pure shadow until it beats the deterministic baseline on the external THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME teacher.
records.duplicates: Partial conceptual overlap with the TensionThoughtPromotion controller (consciousness/meta_cognitive_thoughts.py:70) and GroundingDrivePromotion — both also gate meta-cognitive/tension thoughts on THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME, but those are deterministic promotion controllers, not NNs, so not a true NN duplicate. No other NN encodes trigger-selection features. The 4-class OUTCOME label space loosely overlaps the policy/world-model reward signals other specialists consume, but no redundant NN computes the same thing.
records.concerns: (1) The home-file encoder is fully ORPHANED dead code — never imported; the live config in types.py does NOT use it. (2) Cross-module DIMENSION MISMATCH: encoder FEATURE_DIM=44 (line 24) vs DistillationConfig input_dim=24 (types.py:516) — even if wired, shapes wouldn't match; flagged in subsystem_registry.json:2425. (3) LABEL-SPACE MISMATCH between the two implementations: config output_dim is the trigger count (~13, enforced by the assert at types.py:582-590) whereas the encoder's encode_label produces a 4-class OUTCOME one-hot — the two definitions were written by different iterations and never reconciled. (4) No producer emits the feature_source/teacher signals, so the collector gets nothing and the gate correctly reports input-starved. Net: this is a stub artifact, not a functioning feed; it is honestly shadow-gated (not falsely green), but it is incoherent across the two definitions and should be either wired+reconciled (pick one feature shape + label space, add the emitter that records thought_trigger_features/thought_trigger_resolver into the collector) or deleted. Evidence cites: hemisphere/thought_trigger_encoder.py:1-14,24,60-114; grep "thought_trigger_encoder" -> only itself; hemisphere/types.py:513-522,582-590,385; hemisphere/weight_room_gate.py:69-71; consciousness/events.py:457; autonomy/research_intent.py:188 -> meta_cognitive_thoughts.py:116; scripts/schema_emission_audit.py:134; subsystem_registry.json:2425; data_feed.py:761/818/925 + capability_gate.py:1105 (contrast live feeds).
records.fix_needed: To actually wire it (when P3 earns it): (1) add a producer that, on tension-seeded ResearchIntent completion, records BOTH a thought_trigger_features feature signal (via encode(state_vector, trigger_type, last_fire_times)) keyed on thought_id AND a thought_trigger_resolver label (via encode_label(outcome)) into distillation_collector — mirror the existing reasoning_validation record at research_intent.py:221. (2) Fix the cross-module dim mismatch BEFORE wiring: encoder FEATURE_DIM=44 (thought_trigger_encoder.py:24) vs config input_dim=24 (types.py:516) — reconcile to one value or training tensors will shape-fail even once a signal arrives. (3) Add a _prepare_thought_trigger_tensors branch in hemisphere/data_feed.py:1074-1086 dispatch so get_training_batch pulls the new feature_source/teacher pair. Until P3 earns the teacher traffic, leaving it BLOCKED_BY_DESIGN shadow is correct — do not flip any lever or tune it green.
records.verdict: The claim is fully verified and I could not refute it. hemisphere/thought_trigger_encoder.py is imported by ZERO Python files (only itself and the audit-doc subsystem_registry.json reference it); encode()/encode_label()/build_metadata() are never called. The config's feature_source="thought_trigger_features" and teacher="thought_trigger_resolver" (types.py:520/514) have NO producer anywhere — the complete repo-wide list of collector teacher signals is acquisition_planner/claim_features/claim_verdict/code_quality_features/diagnostic_detector/diagnostic_features/dream_features/dream_validator/plan_features/reasoning_validation/skill_acquisition_features/skill_acquisition_outcome/upgrade_verdict, none thought_trigger. The intended teacher THOUGHT_VALIDATION_OUTCOME is emitted at research_intent.py:188 but routes only to TensionThoughtPromotion.record_validation_outcome (a separate gate) and to a distillation_collector.record(teacher="reasoning_validation") (a DIFFERENT specialist) — never to this NN. So the DistillationCollector receives no thought_trigger feature/label pair and no student is ever trained: frozen-untrained is accurate. weight_room_gate.py:69 itself classifies it MODE_BLOCKED_BY_DESIGN, so this is orphaned/unwired BY DESIGN (shadow stub awaiting a P3 signal), not a regression.

records.name: hemisphere_distillation
records.purpose: The Super-Synapse data-capture/storage layer that records teacher-model signals (with provenance + immune primitives) so the Tier-1 hemisphere specialist NNs can be distillation-trained from them. It is the training-data PIPE, not itself a neural network.
records.teacher_source: Teacher models / lived sensors generate signals during normal inference: wav2vec2_emotion (perception/emotion.py:352), ecapa_tdnn speaker embeddings (audio_stream.py:701, speaker_id.py:269), face_id, tool_router route labels + text embeddings (reasoning/tool_router.py:191-299, teacher = the rule-based router verdict), plan/diagnostic/claim/dream/code_quality/skill_acquisition feature+verdict pairs (data_feed.py), dream_artifacts, research_intent. Synthetic-exercise teachers tagged origin='synthetic' (scripts/run_synthetic_exercises.py, synthetic/*.py) and firewalled from lived metrics. Signal is real teacher outputs (distillation) + lived-outcome metadata, NOT RL reward.
records.consumed_by: hemisphere/orchestrator.py:1485 _run_distillation_cycle -> hemisphere/data_feed.py:649-1087 get_training_batch pairs feature+teacher-verdict signals into tensors that TRAIN the Tier-1 specialist NNs via _engine.train_distillation (orchestrator.py:1579). Trained specialists feed the broadcast-slot competition (orchestrator.py:1841-1890, _compute_signal_value :1892) for non-shadow Tier-1 focuses. Also: perception/audio_stream.py:696 get_latest('ecapa_tdnn') enriches live audio features inline; hemisphere/weight_room_gate.py:155-166 reads get_stats for shadow would-block decisions; hemisphere/reasoning_encoder.py:499 reads the reasoning_validation buffer for shadow observability; dashboard/snapshot.py:2473 + dashboard/app.py:3501 surface get_stats; review_quarantine called from orchestrator.py:1481 in dream/sleep mode. NOT orphaned.
records.maturity_state: Live infrastructure, in active use; the collector itself is fully functional/persisting. The NNs it FEEDS are mixed-maturity: Tier-1 specialists train and some broadcast, but several are in _SHADOW_ONLY_TIER1_FOCUSES (orchestrator.py:141,1844 — trained but excluded from broadcast) and Matrix Tier-2 eligible focuses re-earn authority from PROBATIONARY after every boot (orchestrator.py:250-260,299). Weight-room gating over this data is P2 shadow ('enforces': False, weight_room_gate.py:184-194). live_shadow_accuracy returns None below N=10 (honesty floor, :53,72) so most lived metrics are honestly-unmeasured, not failing.
records.end_state: The provenance-honest immune-system substrate of JARVIS's continual self-distillation: every teacher signal captured during normal inference becomes durable, deduped, fidelity-scored, lived-vs-synthetic-firewalled training fuel so Tier-1/Tier-2 specialist NNs can be grown from her own lived experience (weight-room earned-promotion). Promoted role = the trusted memory of 'what her teachers said and how much to trust it', enabling the asymmetric weight-room gate (block authority, never block training) and lived-only accuracy reporting as specialists earn broadcast authority and eventually reduce teacher dependence.
records.duplicates: Partial overlap with perception/diarization_collector.py (DiarizationCollector) — a SEPARATE, narrower windowed-embedding capture buffer writing ~/.jarvis/diarization_training/segments.jsonl for the diarization learning job only; it duplicates the capture+JSONL+rotation pattern but is purpose-scoped (gated to collect-phase) and feeds a different pipeline, so it is specialization rather than true redundancy. live_shadow_accuracy here is deliberately mirrored from intention_resolver._shadow_metrics_locked (distillation.py:66-68) — intentional shared-shape, not a dup. No second general teacher-signal collector exists.
records.concerns: (1) Not a NN at all — it has no parameters; calling it the 'hemisphere_distillation NN' conflates the data pipe with the specialists it trains. The real NNs live in orchestrator/data_feed; audit those for model quality. (2) check_consensus (:391-404) is a string-prefix heuristic with no training and no clear consumer found in-repo — verify it isn't dead. (3) review_quarantine corroboration (:351-389) promotes any quarantined sample if ANY same-teacher signal with fidelity>=0.7 falls within a 10s window regardless of signal_type/content similarity — weak corroboration that could promote unrelated low-fidelity samples. (4) _parse_jsonl defaults rehydrated fidelity to 0.5 and origin to 'disk' (:187-188); 'disk' is treated as LIVED by _is_synthetic_origin, so any synthetic sample whose origin tag was lost on an older-format line would silently count as lived — a small provenance-firewall leak across boots. (5) The honest weak point is downstream, not here: many fed specialists are shadow-only / re-earning authority / below N=10, so the captured data is largely fuel-in-waiting rather than live behavioral influence — the pipe is healthy, but consumption-by-behavior is gated/partial by design.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: The claim is accurate and NOT orphaned. The DistillationCollector captures real teacher signals during inference (tool_router rule-verdict + text_embedding, emotion, ecapa, face) with synthetic firewall, and they are genuinely consumed: orchestrator._run_distillation_cycle pulls get_training_batch via prepare_distillation_tensors and calls engine.train_distillation (a real Adam/backprop/grad-clip/weighted-loss update step, not a stub) which sets network accuracy; trained non-shadow Tier-1 specialists then feed get_hemisphere_signals broadcast-slot competition whose slot_0..slot_3 are appended into the live policy/state_encoder vector via consciousness.engine — a real behavioral consumer, not a shadow log. The cited shadow reads (weight_room_gate get_stats, reasoning_encoder reasoning_validation) and inline audio enrichment (get_latest ecapa_tdnn) all check out, and the 'non-shadow Tier-1' qualifier correctly matches _SHADOW_ONLY_TIER1_FOCUSES.

records.name: hemisphere_registry
records.purpose: Versioned persistence + active-pointer registry for the hemisphere specialist NN fleet — it is INFRASTRUCTURE, not itself a neural network (no torch/nn.Module/forward/parameters; registry.py grep for neural compute = NONE).
records.teacher_source: none — registry.py has no training loop, no teacher, no gradients. It is a key-value/version store. The accuracy/loss it persists are produced upstream by HemisphereEngine eval (engine.py PerformanceMetrics) and stored verbatim; best_version() ranks by stored accuracy only (registry.py:137,184). The NNs it tracks are trained elsewhere (engine/evolution/distillation); the registry just records and selects them.
records.consumed_by: hemisphere/orchestrator.py:170 owns self._registry. WRITE path: register(network, save_fn=engine.save_model) + promote() called after birth (orchestrator.py:524-528), after evolution (620-632), and training/replace (1095,1766-1769). READ/RESTORE path (LIVE): _restore loop over self._registry.foci()/best_version() loads weights into self._engine.load_model on boot, with the Tier-2 asymmetric firewall (orchestrator.py:275-323). SHADOW INFER: acquisition/orchestrator.py:3358-3374 calls HemisphereRegistry().get_active('plan_evaluator') then engine.infer for the shadow plan_evaluator prediction. DASHBOARD: get_state() -> orchestrator.get_state() (orchestrator.py:2630) -> consciousness/engine.py:217-218 hemisphere state surfaced. Also discard_version on incompatible checkpoints (orchestrator.py:293,2906,2918). Confirmed in subsystem_registry.json:851,858 and ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md:100.
records.maturity_state: Live/shipped infrastructure but operating over a near-empty fleet. Per ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md:100 the lived idle state is "_networks empty until restore; 0 births/promotions; active_substrate=RULE_BASED". So the registry CODE is live and consumed, but on a fresh brain there are typically 0 persisted versions to restore/serve (healthy idle, not broken). It is the weight-persistence keystone from the weight-persistence P0 work (subsystem_registry.json:851 "weights persist, authority RE-EARNS").
records.end_state: The durable spine of the maturing specialist fleet: as Tier-2 Matrix specialists actually get born, trained, and earn promotion on lived reps, this registry is what makes them SURVIVE restarts (boot-restore last-known-good weights so the brain rebuilds competence fast) while the asymmetric firewall (orchestrator.py:299-312) forces authority/standing to re-earn. It becomes the version-control + active-model selector underpinning every promoted hemisphere specialist — i.e. the persistence guarantee that lets distilled/grown specialists accumulate across the brain's life instead of resetting to zero each boot.
records.duplicates: Pattern-duplicate, not function-duplicate: its own docstring says it "mirrors brain/policy/registry.py" — a parallel registry for the policy NN. Same role (versioned weight persistence + active pointer) for a different fleet, so it is intentional parallelism rather than redundant overlap. skills/registry.py and tools/plugin_registry.py are unrelated namesakes (skill/plugin lifecycle, not NN weights). No redundant NN.
records.concerns: (1) Naming/classification error in the audit list: 'hemisphere_registry' is NOT a neural network — it computes no inference and trains nothing; auditing it as an NN mislabels it. It is persistence infra for the NN fleet. (2) get_state() reads training_accuracy/validation_accuracy via getattr fallbacks (registry.py:224-225) but ModelVersion has no such fields and they aren't serialized in _mv_to_dict, so best_training/best_validation always silently fall back to plain accuracy — dead/aspirational fields, harmless but misleading on the dashboard. (3) best_version() ranks purely on the stored accuracy float (registry.py:137); since the Tier-2 firewall RESETS performance to PerformanceMetrics() on restore (orchestrator.py:305), the persisted accuracy that selection trusts can be stale relative to live standing — acceptable because authority re-earns, but the selector's 'best' is a pre-reset training number, not a lived one. (4) acquisition/orchestrator.py:3361 instantiates a SECOND HemisphereRegistry() (separate from the orchestrator's self._registry) for shadow plan_evaluator inference; both read the same on-disk state so it works, but it's a duplicate in-memory instance that could drift from the orchestrator's view within a process. No orphaning or broken-wire found.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: The registry is a genuine version/persistence store that is live-consumed by hemisphere/orchestrator.py: register/promote on births/evolution/training are wired, and the boot-restore path (_restore_persisted_specialists actually called at orchestrator.py:184) reads foci()/best_version() and loads weights via engine.load_model with a real asymmetric Tier-2 firewall (perf reset + PROBATIONARY at lines 299-312); restored networks land in self._networks and are reused for birth-dedup (line 936) and dashboard state (get_state->registry.get_state line 2630->consciousness/engine.py:218). The training claim is accurate: registry.py has no training loop, teacher, or gradients (grep confirmed) — it records upstream PerformanceMetrics verbatim (lines 87-88) and best_version() ranks by stored accuracy only (line 137); the acquisition shadow-infer (acquisition/orchestrator.py:3347-3406) is correctly shadow — _resolve_shadow_prediction only logs accuracy and never alters the verdict.

records.name: weight_room_gate
records.purpose: A shadow governance gate that decides, per distilled specialist, whether it WOULD be blocked from gaining promotion authority under the lived-before-synthetic rule — and logs that decision without enforcing it.
records.teacher_source: none
records.consumed_by: Only dashboard/snapshot.py:1168-1169 (reads get_status(), writes it to snapshot['weight_room_gate'] for telemetry). NO authority consumer: the would_block / lived_baseline_met decision is never read by the actual promotion path — hemisphere/registry.py:101-113 promote() just flips is_active with zero gate consultation; grep for lived_baseline_met/would_block/would_allow finds no enforcement site (the oracle_benchmark.py would_block hits are an unrelated coherence-seal check). Not rendered in any HTML/JS either. Effectively orphaned of behavioral consumers; only the dashboard snapshot and the change-log logger.info consume it.
records.maturity_state: Phase P2 shadow (self-declared get_status phase='P2_lived_baseline_registry', authority='shadow_would_block_only', enforces=False; weight_room_gate.py:184-194). It computes and logs live over real collector counts but enforces nothing — a working shadow registry, by design. Not 'earning' toward any auto-flip; the P2→P3 enforcement transition is an explicit operator/design step, not a metric the gate accrues.
records.end_state: P3+: become the ASYMMETRIC authority gate that actually DENIES a distilled specialist promotion authority (never blocks training or shadow inference) until it has met its per-specialist lived baseline — enforcing 'lived baseline first, synthetic amplification second, promotion third, never in reverse' (AWAKENING_PROTOCOL.md:116). Docstring: 'P3 is the first phase that denies authority'; get_status note: 'P3 enforces, advisory'. Its promoted role is the integrity firewall that prevents a specialist from gaining real influence on synthetic practice alone.
records.duplicates: Partial conceptual overlap, not redundancy. It shares the lived-vs-synthetic firewall THEME with: (1) the eval/fidelity scoreboard's predictive_accuracy_LIVE synthetic-firewall, (2) the counterfactual engine's live_influence=OFF gate, (3) skill_acquisition_weight_room status (synthetic.skill_acquisition_dashboard, also surfaced one block below at snapshot.py:1173). Each gates a different surface (specialist promotion authority here, vs scoreboard reads / counterfactual influence / skill-acquisition telemetry), so it is the would-block evaluator specialization rather than a duplicate. It is the sole would-block authority evaluator for hemisphere specialists.
records.concerns: (1) Not an NN — labeling it a 'neural network' is a category error; it is a hardcoded-threshold heuristic with no learned weights, no torch, no training signal. (2) STALE classification (documented governance bug): code_quality is hardcoded MODE_BLOCKED_BY_DESIGN with reason 'no live code-quality outcome signal wired' (lines 72-74), but the upgrade_verdict feed IS recorded live at system_upgrade_report.py:346 — flagged in ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md:174,207 and subsystem_registry.json:2426 as real governance-metadata staleness; the gate was never re-classified, so it will incorrectly mark a live-fed specialist as un-gatable. (3) Brittle substring routing: classify() maps by name prefix, so a new teacher whose name doesn't start with a known token silently lands in NOT_YET_GATABLE — honest (never a silent allow) but means coverage decays as feeds are renamed. (4) Even at its designed P2 state it has no behavioral consumer; if P3 never lands it remains a dashboard ornament. None of these are 'broken' relative to the explicit shadow contract (enforces=False is intentional), but the code_quality staleness is a concrete defect.
records.fix_needed: none — shadow-logged is the as-designed P2 state (would-block decisions are surfaced via the snapshot but never enforced; P3 is the designed phase that turns this into the asymmetric authority firewall by inserting a gate check into registry.promote()/orchestrator promotion sites). It is correctly NOT wired into the promotion path yet. The only nit: the claim's secondary framing of it as "effectively orphaned of behavioral consumers" is technically true today but is the intended P2 shadow posture, not a bug to repair.
records.verdict: Claim is accurate and survives refutation. WIRING: the only non-test consumer of get_status() is dashboard/snapshot.py:1168-1169 (telemetry only); the live promotion path (registry.promote() at orchestrator.py:528/632/1769, flipping is_active by accuracy at line 629) never imports or consults the gate, and grep finds no enforcement site for would_block/lived_baseline_met — the oracle_benchmark.py:732 would_block is an unrelated local var in a SPARK seal-coherence check. No HTML/JS render (grep exit 1). This is shadow-logged by explicit design (docstring: "It enforces NOTHING — P3 is the first phase that denies authority"), not an accidental orphan. DISTILLATION: not applicable — this is a pure heuristic (substring classify() + integer floor thresholds), no NN, no weights, no teacher, no update step; "heuristic-no-training / teacher=none" is correct. Its input lived/synthetic counts do come from real DistillationCollector origin telemetry, so the data feed is genuine even though the gate itself never learns.

records.name: hemisphere_engine
records.purpose: Shared PyTorch substrate that builds, trains, evaluates, distills, and runs inference on ALL hemisphere networks (Tier-1 base nets + Tier-2 Matrix specialists) — it is the infra "factory + runtime," not itself a single trained NN.
records.teacher_source: Mixed, depending on which network the engine is training. (1) Tier-1 base nets (MEMORY/MOOD/TRAITS/GENERAL): supervised on HEURISTIC proxy labels built in data_feed._make_label, blended 70% heuristic / 30% real conversation outcome (_OUTCOME_BLEND), data_feed.py:514-588. (2) Distillation students: real teacher specialists per DISTILLATION_CONFIGS in hemisphere/types.py:389+ — e.g. speaker_repr<-ecapa_tdnn, face_repr<-mobilefacenet, emotion_depth<-wav2vec2_emotion, plan_evaluator<-acquisition_planner, claim_classifier<-claim_verdict, with fidelity-weighted soft labels. (3) Tier-2 Matrix specialists: SELF-SUPERVISED distillation — the NN predicts its own focus-encoder's regime label from live perception/memory/mood buffers (orchestrator.py:998-1057). engine.py itself is teacher-agnostic; it just consumes whatever (features,labels,weights) the orchestrator/data_feed hands it.
records.consumed_by: PRIMARY (live): hemisphere/orchestrator.py:1908 _compute_signal_value -> engine.infer() -> get_hemisphere_signals() (orchestrator.py:1830) -> consciousness/engine.py:821-823 on EVERY tick -> StateEncoder.set_hemisphere_signals -> policy/state_encoder.py:165-170 writes engine inference outputs into dims 16-19 (broadcast slots) of the live 20-dim policy NN state vector; also mirrored into the M6 shadow encoder (consciousness/engine.py:828-830). Also surfaced to perception_orchestrator.py:548/580 and consciousness_system.py:2907. SECONDARY (effectively dead): acquisition/orchestrator.py:3370 calls HemisphereEngine.get_instance(), but no get_instance classmethod exists in engine.py, so the hasattr guard returns False -> engine=None -> that plan_evaluator inference path is a silent no-op.
records.maturity_state: Live/promoted as infrastructure. The engine itself is unconditionally active (instantiated at orchestrator.py:164, runs every consciousness tick). The NETWORKS it builds occupy a spread of maturity states: Tier-1 base nets are READY/promoted and broadcasting; Tier-2 Matrix specialists are gated through a CANDIDATE_BIRTH->PROBATIONARY->VERIFIED->BROADCAST_ELIGIBLE->PROMOTED lifecycle (acc>0.5, impact>0.3, dwell>=10) and compete in a separate sub-conscious lane. So "this NN" = a live substrate hosting a maturity-gated fleet.
records.end_state: Remain the unified neural substrate/runtime for JARVIS's hemisphere cognition: the factory that grows new distilled specialists (Matrix Protocol v2 capability domains) and the inference runtime whose broadcast-slot outputs are a standing input channel to the policy NN's perception of conscious state — i.e. the mechanism by which sub-conscious specialist signals reach decision-making. Its promoted role is "the trainable/runnable hemisphere brainstem," not a single cognitive function.
records.duplicates: No true duplicate. Other torch-training NNs exist (policy/trainer.py for the policy NN, reasoning/shadow_language_model.py, memory/salience.py, memory/ranker.py) but each trains a distinct model with its own loop — none reimplement this engine's shared build/train/distill/infer infra. Functional overlap is limited to "they also use Adam+backward," not redundant purpose. The focus-specific Tier-2 encoders (positive_memory_encoder, speaker_profile_encoder, etc.) compute their own deterministic signals and BYPASS engine.infer (orchestrator.py:1916+), but they complement rather than duplicate the engine.
records.concerns: (1) Broken/dead secondary consumer: acquisition/orchestrator.py:3370 relies on HemisphereEngine.get_instance(), which does not exist on the class — the guarded path is a permanent no-op, so plan_evaluator distillation inference at that site never runs (silent failure, no log). (2) Distillation-teacher honesty risk is in the data layer, not the engine: Tier-1 labels are 70% heuristic proxies (data_feed._make_label), so accuracy on those nets reflects fit-to-heuristic, not lived ground truth — the broadcast signal they feed into the policy state vector is partly heuristic-derived. (3) _loss_to_accuracy converts loss to a [0,1] "accuracy" proxy (exp(-loss) for KL/cosine, 1-loss for MSE); this is a smooth distance-to-target proxy, not classification accuracy, and is what drives lifecycle gates (acc>0.5) and broadcast ranking — easy to misread as real predictive accuracy. (4) _evaluate hardcodes several metrics (convergence_rate 0.8/0.4, reliability=val_acc*0.9, migration_readiness 0.8/0.3, consciousness_score=val_acc*memory_density), so downstream "performance" fields are partly formulaic rather than measured. records.name: hemisphere_orchestrator
records.purpose: Top-level coordinator that births/trains/evolves/prunes the whole hemisphere sub-NN fleet and publishes their top-N signals as "broadcast slots" into the policy StateEncoder. It is a controller, NOT a trained network itself (it holds no weights).
records.teacher_source: No single teacher for the orchestrator (it has no weights). Its managed networks train from: Tier-1 specialists = distillation from teacher models/signals via DISTILLATION_CONFIGS + distillation_collector (orchestrator.py:1485-1582; teacher embeddings e.g. 192-dim speaker, 512-dim face); Tier-2 Matrix specialists = self-supervised distillation against their OWN encoder's 4-class regime label (903, 962-1106) — i.e. synthetic self-teacher, NOT external ground truth; standard-focus NNs = outcome-triggered retrain from lived conversation/emotion outcomes buffered via record_outcome (2948-2977).
records.consumed_by: consciousness/engine.py:821-823 calls get_hemisphere_signals() every tick and feeds it to self._state_encoder.set_hemisphere_signals(); StateEncoder.encode (policy/state_encoder.py:165-170) places slot_0..slot_3 at dims 16-19 of the live state vector; policy/policy_nn.py:150 encodes that vector and runs the policy NN; policy_interface.decide() (policy_interface.py:103-128) -> apply_policy_decision (engine.py:1394-1422) mutates real behavior knobs (mode, kernel budget, thought weights, response length). BUT that final apply only fires when self._policy_interface.has_active_features() is True AND confidence>0.3 (engine.py:970-974), and ALL policy feature flags default False (policy_interface.py:46-55), earned only via auto_enable_features thresholds (200-1000 experiences, 0.40-0.60 win-rate). So the slots reach the live encoder vector but their downstream behavioral effect is gated off. Also consumed live-read: dashboard get_state()/matrix_report() and learning-job context (main.py:829).
records.maturity_state: Mixed/gated. The orchestrator itself is live and ticking (instantiated main.py:507, enable_hemisphere main.py:509). Tier-1 distilled specialists train and their accuracy-as-signal populates broadcast slots (live-produced). Tier-2 Matrix specialists are mostly shadow/earning: they birth + self-train + walk the lifecycle but promotion is earned in a separate sub-conscious lane and most never reach PROMOTED. Crucially the CONSUMER (the policy NN) is itself a signal dead-end: per project memory the policy NN A/B win-rate gate is effectively uncrossable (health reward ~96% ties; Spearman ~0.06), so feature flags stay off and the slots never actually steer behavior. Net: producing real signal into a gated-dormant consumer.
records.end_state: Once the policy NN earns its feature flags on real interaction outcomes, the broadcast slots become the live "global workspace" bus: the strongest specialist signals (memory/mood/speaker-identity/temporal-rhythm/skill-transfer + Tier-1 perceptual compressors) would continuously bias the kernel's mode, attention budget, thought-weight mix and response length — i.e. her specialized sub-conscious NNs would shape moment-to-moment cognition. The Matrix Tier-2 lane is meant to grow into autonomously-born domain sub-consciousnesses that earn promotion into that same workspace.
records.duplicates: No direct duplicate — it is the sole hemisphere coordinator. It composes (not duplicates) sub-encoders: hemisphere/{positive_memory,negative_memory,speaker_profile,temporal_pattern,skill_transfer}_encoder.py (Tier-2) and the Tier-1 distilled specialists (emotion_depth, speaker_repr, face_repr, etc.). Functional overlap of CONCERN with policy/promotion.py + policy/shadow_runner.py (both run their own shadow A/B + slot-expansion machinery over the same signals) and with HemisphereRegistry/EvolutionEngine/MigrationAnalyzer which it delegates to.
records.concerns: (1) Consumer dead-end: the entire produce->encode->policy->behavior wire is real and connected, but the terminal stage (policy feature flags) is gated by a win-rate gate that project memory documents as effectively uncrossable, so the orchestrator's broadcast slots influence live behavior only in principle. This is gated-by-design, not a code bug, but means the work is shadow in effect. (2) Tier-2 Matrix promotion is largely self-referential: specialists self-supervise to predict their OWN encoder's regime label (orchestrator.py:998-1106), so "accuracy" measures "learned its own deterministic encoder," not external value; the honesty guard (>=2 distinct labels) blocks degenerate fits but the impact score still leans on this self-fit (downstream_reward = accuracy*1.5, line 2546) — so impact>0.3 can be cleared without proven downstream benefit. (3) The orchestrator is a controller with no weights of its own — calling it a "neural network" is a category slip; the trainable NNs are its sub-specialists. (4) Two parallel slot-management systems (the live 4-slot lane here and the M6 shadow_runner 22-dim lane) increase the surface for the signal feed to silently no-op.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: Every claim verified in code: the hemisphere broadcast slots are genuinely wired into the LIVE policy state vector (orchestrator.py:1830 -> engine.py:821-823 -> state_encoder.py:164-170 dims 16-19 -> policy_nn.py:150 runs the NN), but their downstream behavioral apply (apply_policy_decision engine.py:1394-1422) is correctly gated off behind has_active_features() + confidence>0.3 with all 8 feature flags defaulting False and earned only via _FEATURE_THRESHOLDS (200-1000 exp, 0.40-0.60 win-rate, policy_interface.py:165-172). Training is real and connected: Tier-1 distillation runs a true loss.backward()+optimizer.step() (engine.py:488-490) from teacher-counted tensors, Tier-2 is honest self-supervised distillation against its own encoder's 4-class regime label (synthetic self-teacher, with honesty-guard + rollback), and record_outcome is invoked live from engine.py:1358 — the orchestrator itself is weightless, so "no single teacher" is accurate.

records.name: hemisphere_evolution
records.purpose: A neuroevolution / architecture-search OPERATOR that breeds new hemisphere-NN topologies (crossover + mutation) from the best-performing existing networks of a focus — it evolves architectures, it is not itself a trained forward-pass NN.
records.teacher_source: None for the engine itself (it has no learnable parameters — mutation rates are hard-coded constants, evolution.py:31-39). Its FITNESS signal (the parent-accuracy gate and the success/failure verdict it records) comes from the offspring's training accuracy, which is a loss-to-accuracy PROXY (engine.py:269-282) over labels that are "30% real conversation outcome, 70% heuristic" (data_feed.py:275-276 docstring; _make_label / prepare_training_tensors, data_feed.py:268-374). So selection pressure is driven mostly by self-generated heuristic targets, not externally-validated ground truth.
records.consumed_by: orchestrator.py:563-646 _evolve_focus calls evo.evolve()/evo.record_outcome(); invoked from run_cycle Phase 3 (orchestrator.py:461-466), which is driven by consciousness_system.py:2946 on the ~120s hemisphere tick. The evolved/replacing networks then enter get_hemisphere_signals() (orchestrator.py:1830-1890) which feeds state_encoder.set_hemisphere_signals() in consciousness/engine.py:819-823 -> the policy StateEncoder reads slot_0..slot_3. CAVEAT: EvolutionEngine is instantiated ONLY for _STANDARD_FOCUSES {MEMORY,MOOD,TRAITS,GENERAL} (orchestrator.py:165-168); the documented Tier-1 distilled and Tier-2 Matrix specialists do NOT use it (separate distillation/birth paths). Whether a standard-focus child actually WINS a broadcast slot depends on the 1.15x hysteresis swap vs Tier-1 incumbents.
records.maturity_state: Live but low-leverage. The wire from evolve()->offspring->broadcast slot->StateEncoder is real and exercised every cycle gated by should_initiate_evolution (>=20 memories, density>0.1). Untouched since the 2026-05-12 initial release (only commit). It is NOT one of the maturity-gated/shadow Matrix lifecycle pieces; it is an always-on architecture-mutation operator over the 4 standard focuses, whose offspring compete in the live broadcast but on a heuristic-derived fitness.
records.end_state: A continual neural-architecture-search engine that autonomously discovers better hemisphere topologies for the standard cognitive focuses (memory/mood/traits/general) so the broadcast signals fed to the policy encoder come from progressively better-fit networks — i.e. the "her architecture grows itself" piece of the hemisphere substrate. To genuinely earn that role its fitness must be rebased on externally-validated outcome accuracy rather than the current 70%-heuristic proxy.
records.duplicates: Partial overlap with hemisphere/architect.py (NeuralArchitect) which DESIGNS topologies from the feed for fresh construction — EvolutionEngine instead BREEDS them from existing parents; complementary, not redundant. Conceptually adjacent to the Tier-2 Matrix birth/promotion machinery (orchestrator _check_matrix_births/_train_matrix_specialists) which is the OTHER way new specialists come into being, but that path is entirely separate and does not call EvolutionEngine. No true fleet duplicate.
records.concerns: 1) FITNESS-SIGNAL VALIDITY: parent selection (acc>0.30) and the success/partial/failure verdicts are driven by a loss-to-accuracy proxy on labels that are 70% heuristic / 30% real outcome (data_feed.py:275-276, _make_label). This is near-circular self-scoring — exactly the "metrics are circular self-scores" pattern flagged in memory — so 'evolutionary improvement' may be optimizing toward a heuristic, not lived truth. 2) SCOPE NARROWING: despite the grand 'evolve hemisphere architectures' framing, it only ever runs on 4 standard focuses; the headline Tier-1/Tier-2 specialists bypass it, so its actual cognitive footprint is small. 3) REPLACEMENT RISK: _evolve_focus replaces the weakest sibling whenever the child's (proxy) accuracy is marginally higher (orchestrator.py:600), so noise in the proxy can churn the broadcasting population. 4) No persisted evolution lineage/observability comparable to the Matrix matrix_report — generations live only in-process. None of these are 'broken' (the code runs and the wire is live); they are distillation/fitness-grounding weaknesses.
records.fix_needed: Two accuracy fixes to the claim, not code bugs: (1) Reclassify wiring_status from "live-consumed" to "confirmed-shadow/gated" — the evolved-network signal reaches the policy StateEncoder but only affects behavior once policy features are earned (has_active_features) AND a standard-focus child wins a broadcast slot past the 1.15x hysteresis vs Tier-1 incumbents; today that consume-side is gated-off by design. (2) Tighten the fitness description: the evolution offspring's selection accuracy is trained on FULLY heuristic labels (engine.py _train_model:297-299 omits outcome_history), so the 30% real-outcome blend never touches the evolution swap/record_outcome decision — only the separate Phase-4 retrain uses it. The earned-role fix the claim already names (rebase fitness on externally-validated outcome accuracy) is correct; concretely, pass outcome_history into _train_model so build-time selection is at least as grounded as the retrain path, and ideally use a real validation-outcome accuracy rather than a loss-to-accuracy proxy.
records.verdict: The wiring chain is real and accurately described: EvolutionEngine is instantiated only for _STANDARD_FOCUSES (orchestrator.py:165-168), _evolve_focus (563-646) calls evolve()/record_outcome() and actually stores+registers+promotes winning offspring into self._networks, run_cycle Phase 3 (460-466) drives it, consciousness_system.py:2946 ticks it at HEMISPHERE_INTERVAL_S=120.0, and the evolved nets feed get_hemisphere_signals -> set_hemisphere_signals -> StateEncoder slot_0..slot_3 (state_encoder.py:165-170). The engine itself has no learnable params (pure random crossover/mutation over hard-coded constants, evolution.py:31-39) and its fitness is a loss-to-accuracy proxy (engine.py:269-282); the claim's "70% heuristic" is verified (data_feed.py:_OUTCOME_BLEND=0.3, _make_label:580-582) and is in fact generous — the evolution build path trains offspring on 100% heuristic labels because _train_model (engine.py:297-299) never passes outcome_history (the 30% real blend only enters the SEPARATE Phase-4 retrain path, orchestrator.py:3002-3004). I label it confirmed-shadow rather than live-consumed because the downstream StateEncoder->policy path that would let an evolved slot affect real behavior (apply_policy_decision, engine.py:1394) is gated by has_active_features()/auto_enable_features() (earned, default-off per the governance map); a standard-focus child must also beat Tier-1 incumbents via the 1.15x SLOT_SWAP_THRESHOLD+dwell gate (orchestrator.py:1877). It is genuinely WIRED to two real consumers (broadcast slots; gestation maturity gate at gestation.py:964-985), not orphaned, but its influence on behavior is currently gated/shadow, not asserted-live.

records.name: hemisphere_data_feed
records.purpose: The shared data-feed / tensor-preparation layer that turns live consciousness state + memories into (features, labels[, weights]) training tensors for the hemisphere NN fleet — it is plumbing, not itself a neural network.
records.teacher_source: For prepare_training_tensors/_make_label: a heuristic/synthetic teacher (hand-coded ordinal + affinity tables) optionally blended 30% with real lived conversation outcome_quality from orchestrator.record_outcome (consciousness/engine.py:1358). For prepare_distillation_tensors: external teacher MODELS' outputs collected as fidelity-weighted signals — ecapa_tdnn, mobilefacenet, wav2vec2_emotion, tool_router, acquisition_planner, diagnostic_detector, upgrade_verdict, claim_verdict, dream_validator, skill_acquisition_outcome, thought_trigger_resolver (DISTILLATION_CONFIGS in hemisphere/types.py:389+); paired by metadata key/timestamp window and weighted by teacher fidelity.
records.consumed_by: orchestrator.run_cycle (hemisphere/orchestrator.py:394,410) per tick via consciousness_system.py:2946; prepare_distillation_tensors at orchestrator.py:1550; prepare_training_tensors at engine.py:297 and orchestrator.py:3002; evaluate_rule_based_performance at migration.py:58,121. Orphaned sub-component InteractionDataRecorder/interaction_recorder: NONE FOUND.
records.maturity_state: Live plumbing, in active use every consciousness tick; not itself maturity-gated. InteractionDataRecorder sub-component is orphaned/dead (signal-failure: writes JSONL nobody reads).
records.end_state: Stay the provenance-honest state->tensor adapter that feeds the hemisphere NN fleet, evolving from heuristic proxy labels toward real lived-outcome labels so distilled Tier-1 and gap-born Tier-2 specialists train on genuine interaction outcomes and can earn promotion.

records.fix_needed: Correct the audit's orphan note: InteractionDataRecorder/interaction_recorder is NOT 'NONE FOUND' — it exists and is instantiated (data_feed.py:382, singleton at line 473) but is genuinely ORPHANED (no caller invokes .record/.get_training_data/.check_promotion_threshold anywhere in brain). Either delete the unused class + singleton (and its TRAINING_DATA_DIR/JSONL/EMA machinery, which is the documented but never-wired 'Phase 5c real interaction data' recorder), or wire record_outcome to also call interaction_recorder.record() so the on-disk JSONL training corpus it was built for actually gets populated.
