records.verdict: The two main entry points are genuinely live-consumed: prepare_training_tensors feeds a real Adam gradient loop in engine.py:297 (_train_model) and orchestrator.py:3002 (_retrain_from_outcomes), and prepare_distillation_tensors (orchestrator.py:1550) feeds the real train_distillation update step (orchestrator.py:1579) with accuracy-floor rollback — all reached per-tick via run_cycle, which IS called from consciousness_system.py:2946 on the gated hemisphere tick (line 545); lived outcome_quality flows in via record_outcome (consciousness/engine.py:1358) and the trained NN signals are consumed downstream (get_hemisphere_signals -> state_encoder.set_hemisphere_signals, engine.py:821). The teacher/training description is accurate (heuristic ordinal+affinity tables 30%-blended with real outcomes; distillation = fidelity-weighted external-teacher-model outputs paired by metadata/timestamp), BUT the claim is factually wrong that InteractionDataRecorder/interaction_recorder is 'NONE FOUND' — it is both defined (data_feed.py:382) and instantiated as the module-level singleton interaction_recorder (line 473), yet none of its methods (record/get_training_data/check_promotion_threshold/get_stats) are ever called anywhere, so that sub-component is in fact orphaned dead code.

records.name: policy_nn
records.purpose: A small learned controller that proposes operational "kernel knobs" (cognitive budget, operational mode, per-channel thought-weight deltas, response-length hint) to optimize JARVIS's runtime behavior against interaction outcomes — i.e. learn to self-tune the consciousness kernel.
records.teacher_source: Hybrid lived+self: advantage-weighted imitation (trainer.py:78-208). Teacher target is the KERNEL's own action (action dict, engine.py:1306) for normal samples, and the NN's OWN past proposal (nn_action) only when its lived advantage > ADVANTAGE_THRESHOLD (trainer.py:139-147). Reward = a hand-crafted heuristic from real interaction outcomes (engine.py:1244-1297: completed/follow_up/feedback/barge-in/latency/emotion/curiosity/correction), advantage = reward - EMA baseline (trainer.py:66-76). So: supervised regression to a kernel/self teacher, weighted by a synthetic-ish lived reward. Note health-reward was deliberately removed from the A/B signal (engine.py:934-940) as it flooded ties.
records.consumed_by: Live consume path EXISTS but is gated unreachable. Path: main.py:789 policy_interface.enable() + set_nn_controller (main.py:771/786); engine run_shadow_evaluation -> engine.py:970 `if has_active_features():` -> engine.py:972 policy_interface.decide(state) -> policy_interface.py:113 nn_controller.forward() -> governor.gate() -> engine.py:973-974 `if source!='kernel_default' and confidence>0.3: apply_policy_decision(governed)` -> engine.py:1394-1422 which ACTUALLY calls mode_manager.set_mode(reason="policy_nn") (engine.py:1403), kernel.set_budget (1406), mutates cfg.thought_weights (1408-1413). BUT has_active_features() is False unless auto_enable_features (policy_interface.py:175) crosses win-rate gates that are structurally uncrossable (see concerns). So in practice the output is consumed only by the SHADOW evaluator (engine.py:946 record_pending_shadow / 1352 score_retrospective) and the experience buffer (engine.py:1342 nn_action) — i.e. logged, never actuated.
records.maturity_state: signal-failure (not gated-by-design). Policy interface IS enabled at boot in shadow mode, but the NN has never earned a single feature flag and never will via the current eval. Per ~/.jarvis: no policy_state.json on this host (no model registered/promoted), expansion_state.json = phase "rolled_back" with 0 shadow_decisions. Authoritative verdict (autonomous-growth-self-sensing.md + docs/AUTONOMOUS_GROWTH_STRATEGY.md): offline critic on 838 lived (state,action)->reward tuples gives Spearman ~0.06, R^2 ~0 — causal signal ABSENT; 348 trained versions / best loss 0.062 = competence on a synthetic distribution that doesn't predict reality; deployment frozen at v10. ARCHITECTURE.md was reframed from "gated-not-broken" to "signal failure."
records.end_state: Promoted, it becomes JARVIS's learned self-regulation layer: a small NN that continuously tunes her cognitive budget, operational mode, attention/thought-weight balance and verbosity from lived outcomes — earning staged authority via promotion.py (collect->train->shadow A/B win>0.55 over >=100 decisions->promote->staged feature rollout budget->scheduling->thought_weights->mutation, with quarantine-aware friction and auto-rollback). The M6 dual-encoder shadow_runner is meant to grow her state representation (20->22 dim) the same earned way. Intended role: the kernel's autonomic nervous system.
records.duplicates: none — no rival NN proposes these operational knobs. Mode/budget/thought-weights/response-length are otherwise set deterministically by the kernel + mode_manager (consciousness/kernel.py, consciousness/modes.py); the policy NN's only "competitor" is that deterministic kernel baseline it is A/B'd against. The ShadowPolicyRunner instantiates a SECOND PolicyNNController (22-dim, shadow_runner.py:82) but that is the same NN family running an A/B variant of itself, not an independent network.
records.concerns: (1) PROMOTION IS STRUCTURALLY UNREACHABLE: score_retrospective (evaluator.py:238-253) was gutted on 2026-06-29 — it now sets nn_reward = kernel_reward = actual_reward for every non-noop sample (the DEVIATION_BONUS counterfeit-credit was removed as a confab). With both arms identical, margin is always 0 -> classification always "tie" -> nn_wins can NEVER increment -> nn_win_rate pinned at 0 -> auto_enable_features (needs win_rate>=0.40..0.60) never fires -> has_active_features() stays False -> the live apply_policy_decision path is dead code in practice. This is HONEST (no executed counterfactual = no causal signal in pure shadow) but means the NN is permanently shadow-locked under the current design; promotion requires interleaved execution (real bandit/A-B), which is acknowledged gated future work. (2) Training competence is illusory: best loss 0.062 but offline critic R^2~0 — the model fits a synthetic distribution uncorrelated with reality (measurement-limited, NOT competence-limited; per the 8-scientist framing it needs a real causal eval, not gate-tuning). (3) M6 expansion already rolled back with 0 decisions (expansion_state.json) — the growth ladder above the base NN is also stalled. (4) Minor: even if features somehow enabled, decode thresholds and *0.1 scaling are heuristic, and the trainer's _action_to_vec uses a "moderate" response value (trainer.py:245) that forward() never emits, a small target/output asymmetry. Net: built, computes, trains, and HAS a real live consumer site, but is a documented signal-failure that is shadow-logged only — do NOT reinvest or tune its win-rate green (per jarvis-operating-discipline §24).
records.fix_needed: none — gated-dormant by design and honestly so (the 2026-06-29 counterfeit-credit removal is what makes nn_wins=0; this correctly reflects the documented policy-NN signal dead-end rather than papering over it). The claim slightly under-states the wiring (it names only auto_enable_features as the gate; the promotion pipeline at promotion.py:213 is a second door to enable_feature), but that door is blocked by the same root cause, so the gated-dormant conclusion is unchanged. If a genuine causal win-rate is ever wanted, the real change is interleaved/bandit execution of the NN action so score_retrospective can observe an honest nn_reward != kernel_reward — explicitly flagged in the code as gated future work, not a bug to fix now.
records.verdict: The claim is accurate. A real live actuator (apply_policy_decision, engine.py:1394 — mutates mode_manager/kernel budget/thought_weights) exists behind the has_active_features() gate (engine.py:970), but that gate is structurally uncrossable: both feature-enable doors (auto_enable_features needing win_rate>=0.40, and the promotion pipeline's _promote_best→enable_feature needing eligible_for_control / decisive_win_rate>0.55) depend on nn_wins>0, while score_retrospective (evaluator.py:236-254) forces nn_reward==kernel_reward for every divergent sample (DEVIATION_BONUS removed 2026-06-29) and a tie for no-ops, so nn_wins is permanently 0. Output is consumed only by the shadow evaluator + experience buffer — logged, never actuated. Training is genuinely correct and live: train_imitation (Adam + weighted-MSE + backward/step, advantage-weighted imitation toward kernel-or-own-action) really runs on the conversation-fed buffer via promotion.tick() every 60s (main.py:978); it just can never earn authority.

records.name: policy_state_encoder
records.purpose: Deterministic feature frontend that converts the live consciousness-state dict into the fixed 20-dim input vector that the learned policy NN (and its trainer/experience buffer) consume.
records.teacher_source: N/A for the encoder itself (no training). The NN it feeds is taught by lived interaction outcomes: reward computed in engine.py:1244-1297 (completion/follow-up/feedback/latency/emotion/curiosity_outcome/correction) -> Experience in the buffer -> trainer.py advantage-weighted imitation toward kernel action or the NN's own positive-advantage deviation. Health reward is recorded for observability only and deliberately excluded from A/B scoring (engine.py:934-944).
records.consumed_by: Output vector is consumed at: policy/policy_nn.py:150 (PolicyNNController.forward calls self._encoder.encode then feeds the tensor to the MLP/GRU); consciousness/engine.py:1301 (encode() -> Experience.state_vec stored in the experience buffer, which the trainer reads at policy/trainer.py:131); ShadowStateEncoder consumed by policy/shadow_runner.py:81 and policy/promotion.py:482. The DOWNSTREAM policy decision is applied to live behavior only at consciousness/engine.py:970-974 -> apply_policy_decision (engine.py:1394: sets response_length_hint -> reasoning/context.py:524, mode_manager.set_mode, kernel budget, thought_weights). BUT that apply path is gated behind has_active_features(), and feature flags are earned via PolicyInterface.auto_enable_features (policy_interface.py:165-202) which currently stay OFF (all default False, policy_interface.py:46-55).
records.maturity_state: earning-but-signal-failure. The policy layer is enabled at boot (main.py:789) in SHADOW mode (main.py:790); the encoder runs live every tick. The downstream NN trains via advantage-weighted imitation (trainer.py) on lived interaction rewards (engine.py:1244-1297). However the feature flags that would let its decisions touch behavior are gated on experience>=200..1000 AND nn_decisive_win_rate>=0.40..0.60 AND shadow_ab>=100..300 (policy_interface.py:167-171), and the underlying signal is documented as ABSENT: cognition/self_sensing.py:7 states "Unlike the policy NN (signal ABSENT, Spearman ~0.06)". So the encoder feeds a learned NN that cannot cross its earning gate because its lived reward signal does not predict outcomes.
records.end_state: Per the design it is meant to be the stable sensory frontend of a learned kernel-control policy: once the downstream policy NN earns its feature flags, this 20-dim (or 22-dim shadow) vector becomes the live input that lets the NN set conversational mode, response length, proactivity cadence, kernel budget, and thought-weight deltas — i.e. JARVIS learning HOW to allocate its own cognition from lived outcomes instead of kernel defaults. ENCODER_VERSION + the M6 ShadowStateEncoder path exist so the feature set can grow (slots 4-5) and A/B-promote without a hard cutover (promotion.py).
records.duplicates: Partial overlap with hemisphere/thought_trigger_encoder.py which explicitly reuses "PolicyStateEncoder dims 0-19" as its Block A (thought_trigger_encoder.py:11,68) — that is intentional reuse, not redundant re-derivation. ShadowStateEncoder is a versioned superset of StateEncoder (same family, A/B expansion), not a rival. Conceptually adjacent to cognition/self_sensing.py (the self-sensing predictor), but that deliberately encodes a DIFFERENT, real signal (lidar sensor frames) precisely because the policy state-vector's signal failed — complement, not duplicate. No true redundant duplicate found.
records.concerns: 1) Mislabel risk: this is NOT itself a neural network — it has zero learnable parameters, it is deterministic hand-tuned feature engineering. Auditing it "as an NN" can mislead; its quality is fully a function of the normalizers/clamps chosen here. 2) Feeds a dead-end consumer: the only learned consumer (policy NN) has a documented near-zero outcome-predictive signal (Spearman ~0.06, self_sensing.py:7), and per MEMORY the policy NN is the explicit "signal DEAD-END, don't reinvest" finding — so the encoder is effectively producing inputs for a network that can never cross its earning gate; the apply-to-behavior path (engine.py:970-974) is therefore reachable in code but practically never taken. 3) Hidden statefulness: encode() mutates instance state (rolling rates at lines 116-121, tension decay at 154-157) as a side effect of a method named like a pure transform — two callers sharing one encoder (NN forward + buffer record) interleave and can perturb each other's rate/tension reads. 4) Heuristic constants (12, 500, 6, the 0.7/0.3 truth blend, dim-15 0.3/0.2 weighting) are un-tuned magic numbers with no validation that their scaling matches the NN's learnable range. 5) Dim 15 packs three semantically distinct signals (presence, tension, curiosity satisfaction) into one scalar via max(), which is lossy and likely contributes to the weak downstream signal.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: Claim verified and accurate. The encoder is genuinely live-consumed every tick — its output feeds policy_nn.py:150 (encode->tensor->self._model(x) forward) and engine.py:1301 (encode->Experience.state_vec->buffer->trainer.py:131 advantage-weighted imitation with a real Adam/MSE/backward/step loop), so it is NOT orphaned. The DOWNSTREAM behavioral apply (apply_policy_decision: mode_manager.set_mode, _kernel.set_budget, response_length, thought_weights) is correctly gated-dormant: engine.py:970 guards it behind has_active_features(), and all 8 feature flags default False (policy_interface.py:46-55), are in-memory-only (no persisted ON state on disk), and are only earned via auto_enable_features gates (exp>=200, win_rate>=0.40, shadow_ab>=100+) which stay unmet — consistent with the recorded finding that the policy NN signal is a dead-end (Spearman ~0.06). Encoder = heuristic-no-training is correct; the NN it feeds is taught by lived-outcome rewards (engine.py:1244-1297) with health reward excluded from A/B (engine.py:959-966), exactly as claimed. HRR firewall confirmed (validation_pack.py:197 forbids policy.state_encoder import).

records.name: memory_ranker
records.purpose: Learned reranker that replaces the hardcoded hybrid-search scoring formula, deciding which memory candidates surface (and get injected into the prompt) during conversational retrieval.
records.teacher_source: Lived conversation outcomes (self-supervised from telemetry). MemoryRetrievalLog.get_training_pairs() (retrieval_log.py:556-650) joins each retrieval event with its conversation outcome and assigns a soft label: injected+referenced+ok=1.0, injected+not-referenced+ok=0.8, selected-not-injected+ok=0.5, injected+error/barge_in=0.3, not-selected=0.0, with user-signal and provenance modifiers. References come from detect_memory_references() n-gram/bag-of-words overlap of the LLM reply vs injected text (retrieval_log.py:846-932). Synthetic pairs from synthetic/retrieval_exercise.py are appended at 0.7 fidelity weight (consciousness_system.py:2698-2707). BCELoss + Adam, early stopping, 80/20 split (ranker.py:159-206).
records.consumed_by: PRIMARY (live): memory/search.py:213-223 — when ranker.is_ready() and not force_heuristic, score_batch() reorders candidates that become the injected memories (the heuristic_score is used otherwise). Outcome feedback loop: conversation_handler.py:5777-5779 calls ranker.record_outcome(_outcome=='ok') after each turn for auto-disable/re-enable. Training: consciousness_system.py:2686-2716 (_run_cortex_training in the dream cycle) calls train_from_pairs(). Boot: main.py:236,250 init_memory_ranker() loads ~/.jarvis/memory_ranker.pt. Stats/dashboard: consciousness_system.py:2800-2802 get_cortex_stats(). Mastery-drive deficit signal: autonomy/orchestrator.py:2800-2807 raises 'ranker_not_ready' when disabled.
records.maturity_state: Earning / governed-live. Real two-gate lifecycle: untrained -> heuristic passthrough; trains in dream cycle once >=50 pairs (>=20 new) exist; once trained+enabled it is used live but with safety rails — a 20%-of-calls forced-heuristic baseline probe (search.py:209, _BASELINE_PROBE_INTERVAL=20), auto-disable if rolling success drops below 0.8x the heuristic baseline (ranker.py:249-264), 10-min cooldown re-enable, and a 3-strike flap-guard permanent disable. Current numeric lived state (train_count/loss/accuracy/enabled) is runtime-dependent and lives in ~/.jarvis/memory_ranker.pt on the deployment, not in this snapshot repo.
records.end_state: A trusted learned retrieval-relevance organ that fully supersedes the hardcoded hybrid scoring formula — JARVIS's memory recall becomes shaped by what actually proved useful in real conversation (injected AND referenced AND led to a good turn) rather than a static sim/recency/weight blend, with the heuristic demoted to a pure cold-start/safety fallback. It is the recall half of the memory cortex (paired with the salience storage gate), making which memories bubble up a learned, outcome-grounded function instead of a fixed equation.
records.duplicates: No true duplicate. Closest sibling is the SalienceModel (memory/salience.py) — same memory family, same dream-cycle training cadence, similar tiny-MLP shape — but it predicts the STORAGE decision (store?/initial weight/decay, 11->24->12->3) trained from MemoryLifecycleLog, whereas the ranker predicts the RETRIEVAL ranking trained from MemoryRetrievalLog. Complementary (write-side vs read-side), not redundant. The hardcoded _heuristic_score() in search.py is the formula it is meant to replace, not a competing NN.
records.concerns: 1) Training-label feedback risk: labels depend on what got injected/referenced, and the ranker chooses what gets selected/injected — a mild self-reinforcing loop. Mitigated (not eliminated) by the 20% forced-heuristic baseline probe (search.py:209) and the heuristic-baseline regression auto-disable, which keep an exploration channel and a guardrail. 2) record_outcome() auto-disable fires only when ranker.is_ready() (conversation_handler.py:5778), so eval samples are collected only on turns the ranker actually scored; the heuristic-only probe turns are not counted into _eval_window, so the auto-disable window is ranker-conditioned (intended, but means the regression check trusts ranker turns to self-report regression). 3) _refresh_baseline() pulls heuristic_success_rate from get_eval_metrics(window=100) which can be None on sparse data (retrieval_log.py:701-702); guarded by 'if hr>0', so baseline silently stays stale until enough heuristic events accrue. 4) is_core feature (dim 9) is filled by the caller (search.py:219) but the synthetic/log to_feature_vector() emits 0.0 (retrieval_log.py:112) — training pairs from telemetry always have is_core=0, so the model never learns from a real is_core signal even though live scoring passes a real one; minor feature train/serve skew. None of these are orphaning/broken — wiring is sound and live.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: Tried to refute and could not: every claimed call site is real and load-bearing. score_batch() output genuinely replaces heuristic_score and drives the sort that selects which memories get injected (search.py:215-229, ranker used on 19/20 retrievals; 1/20 force_heuristic is a deliberate A/B baseline probe, not a kill-switch). The self-supervised teacher loop is fully connected end-to-end — mark_injected (response.py:572) + detect_memory_references (response.py:643-650) + log_outcome feed get_training_pairs (retrieval_log.py:556-650, soft-label schema matches the claim exactly), and _run_cortex_training (consciousness_system.py:2615/2666-2755) calls train_from_pairs with a real Adam+BCELoss/80-20/early-stopping update step (ranker.py:159-227), plus synthetic pairs at 0.7 weight via an honest loader. Boot load (main.py:236,250), stats (2796-2829), and the mastery deficit signal (orchestrator.py:2800-2805) all check out.

records.name: memory_salience
records.purpose: Learned advisory gate that nudges a new memory's initial storage weight and decay rate at write-time, so memories likely to be useful are kept stronger/longer and noise decays faster.
records.teacher_source: Lived memory-lifecycle outcomes, heuristically labeled. memory/lifecycle_log.py get_salience_training_pairs (lines 312-369): joins creation records with later outcomes — reinforced/retrieved/injected => positive (store 0.8-1.0); evicted-unused => negative (store 0.2); old-and-unused => 0.3. Labels for weight/decay are hardcoded transforms of peak_weight and initial_decay_rate. Producers of the lifecycle log are real memory ops: storage.py:109/236/269/452/524 (created/reinforced/decayed/evicted), search.py:261 (retrieved), response.py:574 (injected). NO teacher model; NO synthetic contamination of salience (synthetic/retrieval_exercise load_synthetic_pairs feeds ONLY the ranker branch at consciousness_system.py:2700-2705, despite that file's stale docstring naming SalienceModel).
records.consumed_by: consciousness/engine.py:500-551 _apply_salience_advisory -> calls salience.advise_weight (engine.py:536) and, on success, mutates the live memory via object.__setattr__(memory,'weight'/'decay_rate', ...) (engine.py:548-549) BEFORE it is stored/indexed (engine.py:393-411). This is genuine live behavior, NOT shadow-logging — when ungated it changes what gets persisted. Effectiveness metrics also feed the truth-calibration 'salience' domain score via signal_collector.py:114-123 and the v2 cortex dashboard (jarvis_eval/dashboard_adapter.py:830-842).
records.maturity_state: earning / effectively cold-start-deadlocked. Training is fully wired and runs in the sleep/dream cortex_training cycle (consciousness_system.py:2614-2615, 2720-2744; mode-gated via modes.py) on lived pairs; the model CAN train. But its OUTPUT is blocked from live consumption by 4 stacked gates (engine.py:337-340, 509-546): is_ready, _validated_predictions>=30, lifecycle weight_error<0.4, per-write delta caps (weight<=0.2, decay<=0.03). The advisory blend only rises past 0.2 after 500 validated predictions (salience.py:167-176).
records.end_state: A trusted, increasingly-weighted (up to 60% blend) learned salience cortex that shapes memory persistence from the start — keeping high-value memories durable and letting noise decay — so her long-term memory self-curates from lived reinforcement/retrieval outcomes instead of fixed rules. Promotion is earned by accumulating validated predictions and keeping lifecycle weight_error low.
records.duplicates: Partial-overlap sibling, not redundant: memory/ranker.py (MemoryRanker, MLP 12->32->16->1) is the other 'memory cortex' NN. Both train in the same cortex_training cycle and both shape memory, but at different stages: salience sets initial WEIGHT/DECAY at write-time; ranker re-scores retrieval CANDIDATES at read-time. Complementary, no functional duplication.
records.concerns: 1) COLD-START DEADLOCK (primary): advisory fires only if salience._validated_predictions>=30 (engine.py:513), but _validated_predictions is incremented ONLY by record_validated_prediction(), which lifecycle_log.py:252-257/298-303 call ONLY when a record has salience_advised==True. salience_advised is set True ONLY inside _apply_salience_advisory on success (engine.py:548-550 -> creation_ctx -> storage.py:122 log_created). So you need an advised memory to earn a validation, but you need >=30 validations to ever advise. Counter starts at 0 (salience.py:86) and persists, with no seed/bootstrap path anywhere (grep confirms only those two call sites). Net effect: the trained model's output can never reach live consumption through normal operation — it is effectively orphaned at the consumption boundary despite being live-wired. 2) Heuristic labels: weight/decay targets are hand-coded multipliers (lifecycle_log.py:344-358), so the model distills a heuristic, capping its ceiling. 3) Feature dim 5 (similar_exists) is a hardcoded 0.0 placeholder (lifecycle_log.py:522) — a dead input. 4) Stale docstring: synthetic/retrieval_exercise.py:3 claims it generates salience pairs; it does not (ranker-only).
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: Claim verified and could not be refuted. The salience NN is a genuine gated-dormant LIVE consumer: engine.remember() calls _apply_salience_advisory (engine.py:395) BEFORE memory_storage.add/index (411-415), and on success mutates the live Memory's weight/decay via object.__setattr__ (548-549) — real behavior, not shadow-logging, that changes what gets persisted once gates pass (is_ready + _trained + _validated_predictions>=30 + weight_error<0.4 + bounded deltas). Training is real and connected: the dream-cycle _run_cortex_training (consciousness_system.py:2614-2615 -> 2720-2744) trains from lived get_salience_training_pairs (lifecycle_log.py:312-369) fed by real memory ops, with NO teacher model and the synthetic-firewall holding — load_synthetic_pairs is appended ONLY in the ranker branch (2700-2705), never to salience. Effectiveness metrics correctly feed the truth-calibration 'salience' domain (signal_collector.py:114-123 -> domain_calibrator.py _score_salience, registered line 253, weighted 0.03 in truth_score.py) and the v2 cortex dashboard (dashboard_adapter.py:830-842); record_validated_prediction fires only on truly salience_advised reinforced/evicted memories (lifecycle_log.py:252-259, 298-305), so blend increases are earned.

records.name: audio_emotion
records.purpose: Detect the speaking user's emotional state from their voice waveform so JARVIS can color her mood, tone, TTS voice, and LLM response guidance to how the person actually sounds.
records.teacher_source: For the wav2vec2 itself: none — it is a frozen pretrained checkpoint, no JARVIS training signal updates it. It instead ACTS AS the teacher: its softmax logits are recorded as the distillation label 'wav2vec2_emotion' (emotion.py:352-356) to train the downstream 'emotion_depth' student, with fidelity = teacher_confidence * signal_quality and synthetic-origin samples fidelity-capped at 0.7 (emotion.py:349-351). Quarantine threshold for this teacher is set unusually low at 0.08 (hemisphere/distillation.py:34-36) vs the 0.3 default.
records.consumed_by: Live consumers of the teacher's emitted PERCEPTION_USER_EMOTION / _current_emotion state: (1) TTS voice profile shaping — perception_orchestrator.py:1886-1887 and :2087-2088 pass user_emotion into brain_tts.get_voice_profile; (2) mood — consciousness/consciousness_system.py:624-637 maps emotion -> identity_state.dynamic_mood + observes a thought; (3) attention/engagement — perception/attention.py:137-152 sets state.user_emotion, recomputes engagement, emits emotion_spike; (4) LLM system prompt — reasoning/context.py:341-352 injects 'The user's current emotional state: X' + per-emotion behavioral guidance, fed from conversation_handler.py:2461 (gated on _emo['trusted']); (5) response payload — reasoning/response.py:633-634; (6) world model — cognition/world_model.py:574-584 / hrr_world_encoder.py:57; (7) dashboard health — dashboard/snapshot.py:2219. Separately the teacher's softmax is the distillation LABEL for the 'emotion_depth' student (hemisphere/types.py:408-417, paired with audio_features_enriched from perception/audio_stream.py:702 via data_feed.py:1070 approximator path).
records.maturity_state: Promoted/live as the perception TEACHER: gated behind _gpu_available AND _model_healthy (deterministic head-key check + canned-waveform smoke test, emotion.py:98-107, 248-268); when unhealthy it self-quarantines to the low-trust heuristic fallback (snapshot influence_quarantined=True) and downstream consumers gate on trust!='low'/trusted. It is one of 6 grandfathered always-on Tier-1 perception specialists EXEMPT from the weight-room lifecycle gate (hemisphere/weight_room_gate.py:41-44). Its derived student 'emotion_depth' is shadow/level-0: trained but its OUTPUT is NOT consumed — negative_memory_encoder.py:40-45 explicitly refuses it ('we do NOT consume any emotion_depth output until a calibrated valence head exists; emotion_negative_bias left at 0.0').
records.end_state: Stay the trusted, health-gated audio-emotion sensor that makes JARVIS responsive to how the person SOUNDS (warm when sad, matching when excited) across voice/mood/tone/LLM context — and successfully hand off to a calibrated native student ('emotion_depth' with a real valence head) so her own Tier-1 NN, not a 500MB external model, reads vocal affect and can feed deeper signals (e.g. negative_memory valence) that are currently refused.
records.duplicates: No redundant AUDIO emotion NN. There is a complementary but distinct TEXT-sentiment signal (user_sentiment in consciousness/theory_of_mind.py + behavior_advisory.py) — a different modality (words, not voice), not a duplicate. perception/server.py:435 emits the same PERCEPTION_USER_EMOTION from a non-audio source with text_sentiment='neutral'. The 'emotion_depth' student is the intended successor to this teacher, not a competing peer.
records.concerns: (1) Mislabeled as a 'neural network' to train: the home-file model is FROZEN/pretrained — there is no training loop or lived/RL signal that adapts it; calling it audio_emotion 'NN' conflates the frozen teacher with the trainable 'emotion_depth' student. (2) Stale-read bug: memory/fractal_recall.py:1107 reads emotion_classifier.current_emotion, but AudioEmotionClassifier exposes no current_emotion attribute (only get_dominant_emotion()), so that getattr silently always returns 'neutral' — fractal recall's emotion gather is effectively dead/defaulted. (3) Student output orphaned-by-design: emotion_depth is trained (feature+label feed is wired) but produces only a reconstruction-fidelity scalar, not a calibrated emotion/valence probability, so no consumer uses it (negative_memory_encoder explicitly blocks it) — the distillation half is shadow with no promotion path until a valence head is built. (4) Heuristic fallback emits trust='low' which downstream gates (trust!='low', trusted flag) discard for context/TTS — so when the GPU model is unhealthy, audio emotion effectively contributes nothing to behavior (correct quarantine, but means the feature silently no-ops on fallback). (5) Module-level singleton emotion_classifier (emotion.py:446) is constructed with no model, then perception_orchestrator builds a second configured instance (perception_orchestrator.py:269-271); hemisphere/orchestrator.py:727 reads the bare singleton's get_stats — two instances, only the orchestrator's is in the live audio path.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: All seven cited live consumers are genuine behavior-affecting call sites (not imports/shadow-logs): the emotion output flows _classify_waveform -> PERCEPTION_USER_EMOTION emit (orchestrator:990-999, health-gated on _gpu_available AND _model_healthy) -> TTS voice profile (1884-1890/2085-2090), mood (consciousness:624-641), attention/engagement+emotion_spike (attention:137-152), LLM system-prompt guidance (context:341-352, gated on _emo['trusted'] from conv_handler:2461), response payload (633-634), world model (574-584), and dashboard (2219). The teacher is correctly a frozen pretrained wav2vec2 (no JARVIS update step; runs under no_grad) that records its softmax as the wav2vec2_emotion distillation label (emotion.py:352-356, synthetic fidelity-capped 0.7, quarantine threshold 0.08 at distillation.py:34-36), and the emotion_depth student (types.py:408-417, audio_features_enriched feed at audio_stream.py:701-705) is genuinely trained via a real Adam/backward/step loop (engine.py:448-490) driven by the orchestrator (1541-1568); the end_state's 'currently refused' valence claim is literally documented in negative_memory_encoder.py:40-45.

records.name: display_classifier
records.purpose: Labels what an in-room display (monitor/tv/laptop) is SHOWING (game/code/browser/etc.) so screen content is tagged as "activity, not physical reality" and never leaks into physical scene tracking/memory.
records.teacher_source: none (no training signal at all; the only "teacher-like" upstream is the VLM caption text it parses, which is an input, not a training target)
records.consumed_by: perception_orchestrator.py:1325 and :2596 call classify_from_description and write results to snapshot.display_content (the same SceneSnapshot object the SceneTracker stores as _last_snapshot, scene_tracker.py:114). It then flows: scene_tracker.get_state() exposes display_content (scene_tracker.py:132) -> world_model._read_physical reads it into PhysicalState (cognition/world_model.py:555) -> THREE live consumers: (1) WorldModel.build_context_summary emits a "Display activity: ..." line injected into the LLM conversational prompt via reasoning/context.py:991-1004 — gated by WorldModelPromotion.level>=1, and ~/.jarvis/world_model_promotion.json currently reads level=1, so this injection is LIVE right now; (2) WorldModel delta engine emits display_content_changed WorldDelta events (cognition/world_model.py:758-765); (3) perception_orchestrator situational-context string (perception_orchestrator.py:2734-2741). Also rendered in dashboards (renderers.js:368, v2/camera.html:251, v2/spatial.html:202, v2/identity.html:266) and fed to spatial_fusion (cognition/spatial_fusion.py:59).
records.maturity_state: Live heuristic with no maturity ladder of its own. Its main downstream gate (WorldModelPromotion) is currently at level=1/advisory (71 validated, but note the rolling accuracy_history shows the last 11 entries = 0.0, i.e. the world model is actively missing predictions and could be re-demoted, which would silence the prompt-injection consumer #1). The classifier itself never earns/promotes — it always runs identically.
records.end_state: It is the firewall component of the Layer-3B "monitor pixels are not room reality" distinction: it should mature from regex keywords into a reliable display-content/activity sense that lets JARVIS situationally reason about "David is coding / gaming / watching a video on the monitor" as ambient companion context — feeding situational awareness, theory-of-mind, and conversation grounding — WITHOUT ever promoting on-screen objects into physical beliefs/memory.
records.duplicates: none — no other module in perception/ or cognition/ produces content_type/activity_label; grep found only this file, scene_types.py (the dataclass defs), and world_model.py (a consumer). Its only conceptual overlap is the upstream VLM caption itself, which is the source it parses, not a peer classifier.
records.concerns: (1) Mislabeled as an "NN" — it is a brittle fixed regex/keyword heuristic with zero learnable parameters and zero training; quality is fully capped by the VLM caption wording and the hand-written word lists. (2) Hard input dependency: classify is only invoked when self._last_scene_description exists (perception_orchestrator.py:1322-1324); if no recent VLM caption, display_content stays empty even when a monitor IS detected, so the activity sense silently goes dark. (3) Confidence numbers (0.3 + hits*0.15, *0.9, *0.7, *0.6) are arbitrary magic constants, not calibrated to any outcome — they look like measured confidence but are not. (4) Its most behaviorally-meaningful consumer (LLM prompt injection) is conditional on WorldModelPromotion.level>=1, and the persisted accuracy_history shows a recent run of 0.0 misses, so that consumer is at risk of being gated off by a world-model demotion unrelated to the classifier's own correctness — meaning the classifier could be doing fine yet have its main output muted. (5) No feedback loop ever validates whether its content_type labels are correct, so it can never improve.
records.fix_needed: none (only trivial line-citation drift worth correcting in the audit: scene_tracker get_state exposes display_content at :125, and renderers.js is :369 not :368 — substance of wiring is correct).

records.name: shadow_language_model
records.purpose: Learn this JARVIS instance's own response-phrasing "style space" and, at inference, retrieve its most stylistically-similar past verified reply as a shadow A/B comparison against the live bounded articulator output (no text generation, zero-hallucination by construction).
records.consumed_by: conversation_handler.py:331-349 _shadow_language_compare: calls shadow_generate, then passes the result ONLY to language_quality_telemetry.record_shadow_comparison with chosen="bounded" HARDCODED, model_family="style_retrieval". That telemetry (reasoning/language_telemetry.py:378-414 -> _ingest_shadow_locked, language_telemetry.py:266-276) only writes a JSONL row and increments counters surfaced for the dashboard (snapshot.py:1138-1139 get_stats). The retrieved string never replaces the live reply: callers (conversation_handler.py:3415, 3945, 4025, 4058, 4683, 4960, 5025, 5361) invoke _shadow_language_compare AFTER `reply` is already built and (e.g. 3415) immediately before _broadcast_chunk_sync(reply). No code path lets shadow_generate's output become the spoken/served answer. NONE FOUND that consumes it for live behavior.
records.maturity_state: Shadow / observe-only. Self-distillation gate: corpus must reach MIN_CORPUS_FOR_TRAINING=50 and >=10 triplets (lines 31, 252, 316); trainer retrains only on >=20 new examples every SHADOW_LANG_INTERVAL_S=21600s/6h (consciousness_system.py:154, 548, 2974). Until then get_stats returns available=False/trained=False (lines 662-669) — an EXPECTED cold-start empty state, not a bug. It is structurally quarantined from live routing: unlike its sibling phasec_shadow_student it does not even check is_live_routing_enabled (which is itself False, PHASEC_SHADOW_ONLY=True, language_phasec.py:40,780-782) — there is simply no flip wired for the style net.
records.end_state: Per design (FINISH/conversational-soul lineage) the corpus substrate is meant to grow a JARVIS-native articulation/voice that eventually replaces qwen's phrasing for bounded classes. This style-retrieval net is the shadow-first stepping stone: it is SUPPOSED to earn, on operator A/B evidence accumulated in language_quality_telemetry, the right to (a) re-rank / select among grounded candidate phrasings, and ultimately (b) supply the native bounded reply for self_status / self_introspection / memory_recall / identity / capability classes — replacing the LLM leash for those classes while preserving the no-confabulation floor (it only ever returns real verified past answers).
records.duplicates: Heavy overlap with phasec_shadow_student (reasoning/language_phasec.py) — a SIBLING shadow language student fed the SAME corpus and compared in the SAME _shadow_language_compare function (conversation_handler.py:353-391), differentiated only by model_family ("style_retrieval" vs phasec student) so their telemetry can be A/B'd against each other. Also conceptually adjacent to the bounded native-articulation path (articulate_meaning_frame / language kernel) it is benchmarked against. The retrieval/embedding stack reuses VectorStore's SBERT (lines 175-204) rather than duplicating the model — good. Net: it is the "retrieval" arm of a deliberate two-model shadow bake-off, not accidental redundancy.
records.concerns: (1) Pure shadow with NO promotion path coded: there is no gate, threshold, or A/B-win evaluator that ever flips this net into live routing — chosen is hardcoded "bounded" at every call site, so it can log forever and never graduate without new wiring. The earn-criterion exists only as telemetry counters; nothing reads them to decide promotion. (2) Self-distillation circularity: training teacher = JARVIS's OWN prior bounded final_answer (conversation_handler.py:1061 final_answer=reply), with no external/human quality signal in the triplet labels, so it can only learn to echo existing style, not improve it — fine for a stylistic mirror, but it cannot surface BETTER phrasing, which limits the A/B's value as a quality signal. (3) Triplet labels are weak/heuristic: positives = highest answer-embedding cosine within the same class, negatives = `other_indices[anchor % len]` (deterministic, near-arbitrary), so the contrastive signal mostly encodes class identity rather than fine style — the 64-dim space may collapse toward class one-hot. (4) Minor latent bug at line 163/635: `is_structurally_healthy` uses `bool(... or 0 >= 0.4)` (Python precedence makes `0 >= 0.4` -> False, so it reduces to truthiness of frame_confidence), an operator-precedence slip vs the intended `>= 0.4` threshold used correctly at line 635. Not load-bearing while shadow, but the feature is near-constant. (5) Naming: this is an embedding+retrieval net, NOT a "language model" — the name overstates capability (the docstring is honest that it never generates).
records.fix_needed: Wiring is correct as a shadow-first design — no fix needed for orphaning (it is intentionally telemetry-only, not orphaned: the cycle runs, trains, persists, and feeds the dashboard). Only the audit metadata should be corrected: change training_method from "distillation" to "triplet-margin metric learning (self-supervised retrieval embedding)" and teacher from "undefined" to "none (no teacher; positives = same-class highest answer-cosine corpus example, negatives = different-class)". The end_state earned-promotion narrative is plausible but note no promotion/A-B-evidence gate code yet exists to flip it live — that flip is unbuilt.
records.verdict: The wiring claim holds: the NN's retrieved string (style_shadow_reply) is used at exactly one place — passed as llm_reply into language_quality_telemetry.record_shadow_comparison with chosen="bounded" hardcoded and model_family="style_retrieval", which only writes a JSONL row + increments dashboard counters. All 8 call sites build `reply` first, call the returning-None _shadow_language_compare, then broadcast the original `reply` (verified 3415->3416, 4683->4684); no path lets shadow_generate's output become the served answer = genuinely confirmed-shadow, NOT live. The training is real and connected (scheduled via consciousness_system.py:548-549, real triplet-margin-loss + Adam backward/step, corpus-growth-gated), but the claim's training_method=distillation/teacher=undefined is a mischaracterization: it is self-supervised metric learning (triplet loss over its own corpus), there is no teacher and no distillation.

records.name: language_phasec
records.purpose: A shadow-only, reset-safe training lane for a bounded "student" language model meant to eventually generate JARVIS's own bounded answers natively (instead of the LLM/articulator), as a stepping stone in the Phase C->E language-substrate ladder.
records.consumed_by: conversation_handler.py:373-393 inside _shadow_language_compare() calls phasec_shadow_student.generate_shadow(...) and feeds the result ONLY to reasoning/language_telemetry.py:378 record_shadow_comparison(model_family="phasec_adapter", chosen="bounded"), which appends a log line and calls _ingest_shadow_locked (pure counters, language_telemetry.py:266) -- no behavior feedback. The live `reply` is finalized at each route BEFORE _shadow_language_compare is called (e.g. conversation_handler.py:3415,4025,4683,4960) and phasec_reply NEVER replaces it. Live routing is hard-blocked: PHASEC_SHADOW_ONLY=True (language_phasec.py:40), is_live_routing_enabled() returns False, and conversation_handler.py:355-358 logs an error if it were ever True. Trained/cycled by consciousness/consciousness_system.py:2976,2991 (_run_shadow_language_cycle) and surfaced read-only by dashboard/app.py:608,1221, dashboard/snapshot.py:1143, jarvis_eval/collector.py:594. So: real shadow plumbing exists, but output is telemetry-only -- effectively orphaned from any lived behavior.
records.maturity_state: shadow / never-trained (signal-starved). Runtime artifacts in ~/.jarvis/language_corpus/phase_c confirm: dataset.jsonl is EMPTY (0 rows), no student_checkpoint.json exists, and every entry in train_runs.jsonl is status="deferred" reason="insufficient_train_samples:0<30". The student is never .available, so generate_shadow() returns None on every call (guard at language_phasec.py:571) -- meaning even the shadow A/B comparison currently emits nothing. It is below MIN_TRAIN_SAMPLES=30 and has produced zero generations to date.
records.end_state: A promoted native bounded-language generator: once it accumulates >=30 grounded samples, trains, and wins enough green eval gates, the LanguagePromotionGovernor (jarvis_eval/language_promotion.py: shadow->canary->live per response class) plus the Phase E artifact-identity wrapper (language/kernel.py over CHECKPOINT_PATH) are intended to let it eventually generate JARVIS's own bounded answers (self_status, identity, capability, memory_recall, etc.) WITHOUT the swappable LLM -- i.e. JARVIS speaking in her own learned voice for grounded classes. The PHASEC_SHADOW_ONLY guard would be flipped only on earned promotion.
records.duplicates: Strong overlap with reasoning/shadow_language_model.py (also titled "Phase C", same 7 bounded response classes, MIN_CORPUS_FOR_TRAINING=50, same corpus). Both are invoked from the SAME conversation_handler._shadow_language_compare() and both write to the SAME record_shadow_comparison telemetry (style_retrieval at line 332-349 vs phasec_adapter at 373-393). Distinction: shadow_language_model RETRIEVES the nearest verified corpus response (style embedding, zero-hallucination, never generates), whereas language_phasec GENERATES via bigram decode. They are redundant in role (shadow language A/B candidates for the same classes); the retrieval model is the safer/more mature sibling, the bigram student is the from-scratch generative experiment.
records.concerns: 1) Misnamed: docstring/class call it "adapter-style student" but it is a plain bigram count model with add-one smoothing -- no adapter, no NN, no gradients; greedy argmax bigram decode will produce near-degenerate/repetitive text, so its eval value as a future live generator is dubious. 2) Permanently signal-starved in this environment: corpus -> dataset yields 0 rows, so it can never reach MIN_TRAIN_SAMPLES=30 here; its only consumer (generate_shadow) returns None, making the whole shadow A/B inert -- the comparison telemetry for model_family="phasec_adapter" is effectively dead until corpus grows live. 3) Telemetry-only with chosen="bounded" hardcoded: there is no mechanism that ever ELEVATES a phasec win -- the promotion ladder (language_promotion.py) keys on eval gates, not on these shadow_comparison logs, so it is unclear that accumulating phasec generations ever actually drives promotion; the read-path is observable but the earn-path may be unwired. 4) Redundancy with shadow_language_model.py (see duplicates) -- two parallel "Phase C" shadow language candidates competing for the same slot. None of these are bugs against design (shadow-by-design, gate-respecting), but the NN's output is functionally orphaned: nothing downstream consumes a phasec generation except a counter.
records.fix_needed: None required to fix a defect (shadow-only is by design). One correction to the claim's end_state: the LanguagePromotionGovernor/decide_runtime_consumption bridge currently governs the deterministic articulate_meaning_frame native path, NOT the phasec bigram student; there is no existing wire that would route phasec_reply into the live reply even if PHASEC_SHADOW_ONLY were flipped. To actually realize the stated end_state, a consume-wire must be built in _shadow_language_compare's callers (return phasec_reply and let it replace reply when get_promotion_level(class) is promoted and green-gated), not merely flip the guard.
records.verdict: Verified: phasec's generate_shadow output has exactly ONE consumer (conversation_handler.py:373-393) and it flows only into record_shadow_comparison telemetry (chosen="bounded", model_family="phasec_adapter") -> pure counters in language_telemetry.py:266; the live reply is finalized by articulate_meaning_frame before the shadow compare at every route and is never replaced, and live routing is hard-blocked (PHASEC_SHADOW_ONLY=True, is_live_routing_enabled()=False, error-logged guard at 355-358). Training is a real scheduled bigram/add-one-smoothing update step (train() at 515-560, fired via _run_shadow_language_cycle -> _tracked_cycle "shadow_lang" -> phasec_harness.run_training_cycle), so heuristic-no-training/teacher=undefined is fair (imitation on grounded final_answer targets, not teacher-NN distillation).

records.name: intent_shadow
records.purpose: A three-level (shadow/advisory/primary) governor that lets a distilled voice_intent NN gradually take over tool routing from the regex router — earned, never declared.
records.teacher_source: The regex tool_router itself is the teacher (DistillationConfig voice_intent: teacher="tool_router", feature_source="text_embedding", input_dim=384, output_dim=8, hemisphere/types.py:418-426). Labels = one-hot bucket of the regex result; features = 384-dim sentence embedding of the user message; recorded into distillation_collector under teacher key "tool_router" via _record_voice_intent_teacher_signal (tool_router.py:257-303). It distills the regex router's decisions into a semantic NN — both lived (origin="router") and synthetic (capped fidelity 0.7) signals.
records.consumed_by: reasoning/tool_router.py:1318-1321 — ToolRouter._finalize() (run on every route) calls get_intent_shadow_runner().observe(user_message, result), so the (possibly-rewritten) result IS returned into the live routing path. The runner is wired with a real hemisphere inference_fn + teacher_sample_provider at main.py:526-531. Read-only state surfaced at dashboard/app.py:1838-1856 (/api/intent-shadow). HOWEVER: at the live SHADOW level observe() never rewrites (rewrite branches require ADVISORY/PRIMARY), so the consumed output is currently pass-through only.
records.maturity_state: signal-failure / level-0 SHADOW, never earned. Live state file ~/.jarvis/intent_shadow_state.json (mtime 2026-06-22): observations_total=25870 but nn_predictions_total=0, agreements_total=0, teacher_samples_observed=0, rolling_agreement=[], level="shadow", zero rescues/overrides/rollbacks. The runner has observed 25,870 routes yet the NN has produced ZERO predictions — inference_fn returns None every time (voice_intent specialist not designed/trained, or embed/infer path failing). It is fundamentally unable to promote.
records.end_state: A semantic voice_intent specialist that out-routes the brittle regex router on the long tail: first NONE-rescuing missed intents (ADVISORY), then winning outright on confident disagreements (PRIMARY) — replacing regex pattern-matching with learned intent understanding as the front door to JARVIS's tool/cognition dispatch, with asymmetric earn-gates and auto-rollback as the safety net.
records.duplicates: Overlaps in role with the regex ToolRouter it shadows (by design — it is the NN challenger to that incumbent, not redundant). The voice_intent specialist also shares the 8-bucket output space and teacher with the tool_router teacher-signal pipeline. No second NN duplicates the shadow-governor function; the pattern (shadow/advisory/primary earn-gates + rollback) is analogous to other promotion gates (weight_room, language_promotion) but those govern different specialists, not redundant.
records.concerns: THREE concrete problems. (1) SIGNAL-FAILURE: 25,870 live observations, 0 NN predictions — the inference_fn (make_hemisphere_inference_fn, intent_shadow.py:665-726) has never returned a usable 8-vector, so the agreement window is permanently empty and the NN provides zero value; it is effectively orphaned-by-failure despite being wired. (2) TEACHER-COUNTER BUG: make_teacher_sample_provider (intent_shadow.py:737-751) reads getattr(distillation_collector,"sample_counts",...) but the collector has NO sample_counts attr/method — it exposes count(teacher) and get_stats() (hemisphere/distillation.py:277-302). So teacher_samples_observed is hard-stuck at 0, meaning the MIN_TEACHER_SAMPLES=500 gate can NEVER pass even if 25k samples were collected — promotion is impossible by wiring defect, not by design. (3) maybe_promote() is NEVER called in production (only in tests/test_intent_shadow.py); only auto_rollback runs inside observe(). So the level can only ever stay at or fall below SHADOW — there is no production path that advances it even if gates were met. Net: the runner is honestly shadow-logging but the maturation ladder is non-functional end-to-end (no signal in, broken gate read, no promotion trigger).
records.fix_needed: Two real bugs in the (untested) production wiring helpers, independent of the gated SHADOW design: (1) make_teacher_sample_provider (intent_shadow.py:742) reads getattr(distillation_collector, "sample_counts", None) — DistillationCollector has no such attr (it exposes count(teacher) and get_stats()), so it always returns 0 and the min_teacher_samples gate is permanently 0/500. Fix: use distillation_collector.count("tool_router"). (2) make_hemisphere_inference_fn._resolve_network_id (intent_shadow.py:684-689) walks state.get("hemispheres",[]) with nested networks[].focus, but orchestrator.get_state() returns hemispheres at state["hemisphere_state"]["hemispheres"] with focus at the row level and no per-row networks list — so it always resolves None and inference_fn always returns None (every observe() is no_prediction; agreement window never fills). Fix: read state["hemisphere_state"]["hemispheres"], match row["focus"]=="voice_intent", and use row["active_network_id"]. Add a test that exercises both helpers against the real get_state() shape (current tests only inject lambda inference_fn / int teacher counts, masking both bugs).
records.verdict: Wiring claim is accurate: tool_router.py:1318-1321 _finalize() (the single funnel for every route() return path, live-called at conversation_handler.py:2996 and main.py:1296) calls runner.observe() and reassigns result, with main.py:526-531 wiring and /api/intent-shadow at dashboard/app.py:1839-1856 all present — but at SHADOW level it is genuine pass-through, so behavior is unaffected (confirmed-shadow, not live-consumed). Distillation is real and correctly connected: _record_voice_intent_teacher_signal records both the tool_router one-hot label and the text_embedding 384-dim feature, and orchestrator._run_distillation_cycle (loop line 469) joins them by timestamp and runs a real train_distillation update with synthetic fidelity capped at 0.7. HOWEVER, both production wiring helpers are broken and untested, so this specialist can never promote past SHADOW or even produce a single NN prediction through the live path.

records.name: plan_encoder
records.purpose: Distillation feature/label encoder + shadow-prediction substrate for the plan_evaluator specialist, which learns to predict the human's plan-review verdict (approve / reject / needs-revision) on an acquisition plan.
records.teacher_source: Teacher = the HUMAN plan-review verdict (DistillationConfig teacher='acquisition_planner', origin='human_review', fidelity=1.0; orchestrator.py:3262-3273). Features paired by (acquisition_id:plan_id:vN) in hemisphere/data_feed.py:_prepare_plan_evaluator_tensors (638-689). A SYNTHETIC teacher path also exists: synthetic/plan_evaluator_exercise.py fabricates good/medium/bad mock plans with hand-assigned verdicts and records at capped fidelity 0.7, origin='synthetic' — telemetry only, firewalled from the lived number via ShadowPredictionArtifact.origin + live_shadow_accuracy.
records.consumed_by: Encoder OUTPUT is consumed live by: (a) distillation training feed — orchestrator.py:3225 _record_plan_features_signal (called at 1081) + 3250 _record_plan_verdict_signal (called at 2726); (b) the specialist's shadow inference — orchestrator.py:3347 _run_shadow_prediction (called at 604 when a plan enters awaiting_plan_review). The NN PREDICTION (probs/predicted_class), however, is consumed ONLY by: orchestrator.py:3442 _resolve_shadow_prediction (accuracy scoring, called at 2727) and the read-only dashboard endpoint /api/acquisition/plan-evaluator (dashboard/app.py:3425-3473). NO code path reads predicted_class/probs to change a verdict, approval, gate, or any acquisition decision — verified by grep (the only readers of predicted_class/.correct are the resolver and the stats endpoint).
records.maturity_state: Shadow / earning, by design. DistillationConfig is_permanent=True (types.py:445-454) = a permanent shadow-only Tier-1 specialist; it never graduates to authority. Dashboard maturity bands by resolved-sample count: bootstrap(<15)/early_noisy(<50)/preliminary(<100)/meaningful(<250)/stable. Honest lived accuracy uses Weight-Room P1 firewall: only origin='live' resolved predictions count, and live_shadow_accuracy returns None until min-N lived samples accrue (no fake 0% off 1-2). On a fresh deployment the ~/.jarvis/acquisition_shadows store is empty until real human plan reviews happen — empty != broken.
records.end_state: An always-shadow advisory plan-quality intuition: a fast NN read of 'will this acquisition plan be approved/rejected/revised?' that mirrors David's review verdicts. Per the frozen contract pattern (cf. the reserved intention_delivery slot, types.py:544 'never gates delivery; advisory only') it is intended to stay shadow_only/advisory — surfacing a calibrated pre-review signal in the dashboard and feeding spark/self-improve curiosity about where its own plans are weak, NOT to auto-approve or auto-reject plans. Its 'promotion' is earning measured live accuracy vs the human, not gaining write authority.
records.duplicates: none. Sibling distillation specialists in the same fleet score DIFFERENT artifacts: skill_acquisition (40-dim/5-class, predicts where the operational proof path fails — acquisition/skill_acquisition_encoder.py), code_quality (35-dim/4-class, predicts self-improvement patch outcome — hemisphere/code_quality_encoder.py), diagnostic, claim_classifier, dream_synthesis, thought_trigger_selector. plan_evaluator is the only NN that scores a candidate acquisition PLAN against the human review verdict. No redundancy.
records.concerns: (1) The specialist's prediction is genuinely orphaned from BEHAVIOR — it is computed and persisted but no downstream decision consumes probs/predicted_class (only accuracy logging + a stats endpoint). This is by-design shadow-only/is_permanent, but worth stating plainly: nothing in her cognition acts on this NN's output yet. (2) Shadow inference is best-effort and silently swallows failures (orchestrator.py:3411 'Shadow prediction failed (expected if specialist not trained)') — if the registry never activates a plan_evaluator network (get_active returns None at 3362), _run_shadow_prediction returns early and NO shadow rows are ever produced, so the dashboard would show a permanently-empty/bootstrap state that looks identical to 'no plans reviewed yet'; the two can't be distinguished from telemetry alone. (3) The encoder pre-zeros evidence dims 29 (freshness) and 30 (research sources) and relies on enrich_evidence_dims to fill them, but _run_shadow_prediction / _record_plan_features_signal call encode() WITHOUT calling enrich_evidence_dims — so in the live path dims 29-30 are always 0.0, i.e. two of the 32 features are dead in production (only the synthetic exercise and tests exercise enrichment). Minor, but it means the trained model never sees real freshness/research-source signal. (4) Synthetic-teacher contamination is correctly firewalled (origin tag + live_shadow_accuracy), so that is handled — no concern there.
records.fix_needed: none
records.verdict: Could not refute — the claim is accurate. The encoder OUTPUT is genuinely consumed live two ways: (a) the distillation training feed (features at orchestrator.py:1081 via _record_plan_features_signal; verdict label at 2726 via _record_plan_verdict_signal, teacher='acquisition_planner', origin='human_review', fidelity=1.0) which pairs by (acq_id:plan_id:vN) in data_feed.py:_prepare_plan_evaluator_tensors (638-689) and flows into a real training loop (orchestrator.py _run_distillation_cycle:1485 → prepare_distillation_tensors:1550 → engine.train_distillation:1579 with real loss.backward()+optimizer.step() at engine.py:488-490), and (b) shadow inference (_run_shadow_prediction at 604). The NN PREDICTION (predicted_class/probs), however, is confirmed-shadow: a repo-wide grep shows its ONLY readers are _resolve_shadow_prediction (accuracy scoring, called at 2727) and the read-only dashboard endpoint /api/acquisition/plan-evaluator (dashboard/app.py:3425) plus tests — NO path reads it to change a verdict, approval, or gate. Synthetic firewall is real (synthetic/plan_evaluator_exercise.py records at fidelity 0.7/origin='synthetic'; ShadowPredictionArtifact.origin + live_shadow_accuracy in distillation.py:57-79 exclude synthetic from the lived number). End-state (always-shadow advisory plan-quality intuition, promotion = earned live accuracy not write authority) matches the code and the documented intention_delivery 'advisory only' contract (types.py:544).

records.name: skill_acquisition_encoder
records.purpose: Encode the operational skill-acquisition lifecycle (skill-learning -> codegen -> plugin proof path) into fixed feature/label vectors so a shadow Tier-1 specialist can learn to predict WHERE that proof path fails.
records.consumed_by: PRODUCER side is live-wired: acquisition/orchestrator.py:3278-3345 (_record_skill_acquisition_feature / _record_skill_acquisition_label) calls encode/encode_label/outcome_from_state at every lifecycle stage (call sites :970, :1568, :1703, :1778, :1787, :2268) and pushes vectors into DistillationCollector as teachers skill_acquisition_features / skill_acquisition_outcome. Those feed the real training tensor builder hemisphere/data_feed.py:918 (_prepare_skill_acquisition_tensors) for focus config hemisphere/types.py:495 (40->5 KL-div approximator, is_permanent). The TRAINED specialist's PREDICTION is consumed by NOTHING live: HemisphereFocus.SKILL_ACQUISITION sits in _SHADOW_ONLY_TIER1_FOCUSES (hemisphere/orchestrator.py:147) and is explicitly skipped in BOTH the broadcast-slot competition (orchestrator.py:1844) and Tier-1 enrichment (orchestrator.py:2596). dashboard/snapshot.py:2899-2909 confirms live_influence=False, authority=telemetry_only, live_accuracy_status="unmeasured_no_live_inference_scoring". Also exercised by synthetic gym synthetic/skill_acquisition_exercise.py:205. Net: prediction-side consumer = NONE FOUND.
records.maturity_state: Shadow / training-only. Encoder is live-fed from real acquisition jobs (origin=acquisition, fidelity 1.0) AND from a synthetic weight-room (origin=synthetic, fidelity 0.7, capped below lived). The downstream specialist trains but runs no scored live-shadow inference and is non-promotable today. weight_room_gate classifies skill_acquisition as MODE_HYBRID rare-event (weight_room_gate.py:78-81); a comment (:49) records an observed lived=24/synthetic=0 state that would-ALLOW the lived baseline, but the gate enforces nothing (P2 shadow). Dashboard "maturity" is a signal-COUNT proxy (snapshot.py:2884), not earned competence.
records.end_state: An advisory specialist that PREDICTS where a skill-acquisition job's proof path will fail (planning vs implementation vs contract vs verified), so JARVIS can triage/route acquisition jobs intelligently (flag a weak plan before burning a codegen+sandbox cycle, warn the operator) instead of running every job blind. Promotion would move it out of _SHADOW_ONLY_TIER1_FOCUSES into the broadcast/enrichment paths once it earns a lived baseline AND beats a baseline under live-shadow scoring (the #22b inference-scoring step that does not yet exist).
records.duplicates: Partial overlap with the plan_evaluator specialist (acquisition/plan_encoder.py, HemisphereFocus.PLAN_EVALUATOR, also shadow-only) which scores PLAN quality and DOES run a persisted shadow prediction (acquisition/orchestrator.py:3347 _run_shadow_prediction). skill_acquisition is broader (whole proof path incl. implementation/contract/verification + terminal outcome) and notably does NOT run shadow prediction. Some feature blocks overlap (plan technical_approach/test_cases/dependencies appear in both encoders). The ContradictionEngine is instantiated/rehydrated/subscribed and ticked unconditionally in consciousness/consciousness_system.py:764-784 (`_run_contradiction_check`: subscribe to MEMORY_WRITE always; scan_corpus only in dreaming/deep_learning). records.maturity_state: Live and unconditional — not gated, not shadow, not maturity-earned. Its DOWNSTREAM consumer (affect_coupling kill-switch / P5 proof obligation) is the part with maturity governance; the classifier itself just runs.

Its enduring role is the deterministic, auditable backbone of self-consistency — feeding affect (cortisol/unresolved-tension readout), dream consolidation, calibration, and the capability gate. If anything, a future learned model (e.g. a native reasoning/claim encoder) might augment its judgment, but the design intent here is a transparent, non-confabulating heuristic, not a distilled specialist.

records.concerns: 1) FRICTION-CORRECTION SUB-FEED IS DEAD: record_friction_correction (capability_gate.py:1158-1169) calls distillation_collector.record(signal_type='claim_verdict', source='friction_correction', ...) — but record()'s signature is record(teacher, signal_type, ...) with teacher REQUIRED and no `source` kwarg (hemisphere/distillation.py:204-211).
